language.name: English
mcp.TwiceDiceDescription: Player uses two dice for their next roll. Can be activated on any player.
mcp.ThriceDiceDescription: Player uses three dice for their next roll. Can be activated on any player.
mcp.RerollTokenDescription: Allows you to redo your last roll. Can be used after the maximum items per turn limit is reached.
mcp.PlayerSwapperDescription: Choose any player to swap board positions with.
mcp.GhostModeDescription: Allows you to move through any blocked off path on your turn, makes you immune to traps and Pocket Plunderers, and adds 3 to your next roll.
mcp.CoinSnatcherDescription: Steals 6 coins from another player of your choice.
mcp.FireTrapDescription: Any foe that crosses this trap loses 1 coin for every spot passed for the remainder of their turn. Expires after 3 uses.
mcp.ZapTrapDescription: Any foe that crosses this trap gets zapped and gives 2 coins to the trap setter for every spot they pass until the end of their turn. This is a single use trap.
mcp.EnderTrapDescription: Any foe that lands on this trap gets sent back to the start of the board and the spot landing event does not occur. This is a single use trap.
mcp.DoubleStarVoucherDescription: Allows you to buy two stars at a time when crossing the main star seller. You must pay for both stars.
mcp.TripleStarVoucherDescription: Allows you to buy three stars at a time when crossing the main star seller. You must pay for all three stars.
mcp.SpiritShieldDescription: Passive ability. Upon activation protects you from the next player that tries to steal a Star or Coins from you.
mcp.CandyCannonDescription: Launches you closer to the Star Seller.
mcp.SandyCannonDescription: Launches you closer to the Star/Ztar Seller.
mcp.GoodieBagDescription: Instantly gives you three random items. Can receive any item in the game except for Star Stealers, Crazy Clocks, Star Vouchers.
mcp.MiniDiceDescription: Player can only roll 1-3 for their next roll. Can be activated on any player.
mcp.MagicDiceDescription: Allows you to choose how many spaces you or another player will move on their next turn. Can only choose numbers 1-10.
mcp.CrazyClockDescription1: Sets the game to the last five turns and runs a special event after the current turn is over. Only one player can hold a crazy clock at a time.
mcp.CrazyClockDescription2: Increases the number Stars to win by 1 if a special event has occurred. Decreases the number of Stars to win by 1 if a special event has not occurred. Only one player can hold a crazy clock at a time.
mcp.PickpocketerDescription2: Coins from every player that you pass on the board. Expires after 3 turns.
mcp.WarpToStarDescription: Teleports you to the main star seller, but you still have to pay for the star.
mcp.WarpToStarDescription2: Teleports you to the closest main star seller, but you still have to pay for the star.
mcp.AnvilTrapDescription: Any foe that lands on this trap gives the trap setter 10 coins.
mcp.IceTrapDescription: Any foe that crosses this trap loses half of their current roll (rounded down if odd). Expires after 3 uses.
mcp.StarSchmooverDescription: Moves the main Star Seller to a random new location.
mcp.StarSchmooverDescription2: Moves the Star Seller (furthest away from the player using the item) to a new random location.
mcp.StarStealerDescription: Allows you to steal one star from another player. Bonus stars unaffected by this item.
mcp.StarProtectorDescription: Makes one of your stars permanently yours for the remainder of the game. Players can still steal unprotected stars.
mcp.MinionPetDescription: Summons a minion where you stand. Swap places with the minion at any point during your turn. Land on both the minion's space and your own space. Adds 1 to your roll.
mcp.StarShardDescription: Automatically converts to a Star when you collect 5.
mcp.ReverseABoardDescription: Reverses the direction of the board for your turn. You will move backwards on your turn.
mcp.WeightedTwiceDiceDescription: Choose any player to roll with two dice on their next turn. Each dice is more likely to roll a higher number.
mcp.WeightedThriceDiceDescription: Choose any player to roll with three dice on their next turn. Each dice is more likely to roll a higher number.
mcp.PremiumRerollTokenDescription: Lets you roll the dice again. After rerolling, can choose to keep your new roll or take your original roll. Can be used after the maximum items per turn limit is reached.
mcp.PlayerSwiperDescription: Choose any player to swap board positions with and steal a random item from them worth less than 15 coins.
mcp.GhoulModeDescription: Allows you to move through any blocked off path, converts any opponents' traps that you cross to yours on your turn, makes you immune to Pocket Plunderers, and adds 3 to your next roll.
mcp.CoinStealerDescription: Steals 10 coins from another player of your choice.
mcp.InfernoTrapDescription: Any foe that crosses this trap loses 2 Coins for every spot passed for the remainder of their turn. Expires after 3 uses.
mcp.LightningTrapDescription: Any foe that crosses this trap gets zapped and gives 3 coins to the trap setter for every spot they pass until the end of their turn. This is a single use trap.
mcp.EnderAuraTrapDescription: Any foe that lands within one space of this trap gets sent back to the start of the board. This is a single use trap.
mcp.DoubleStarDiscountVoucherDescription: Allows you to buy two stars at a time for the cost of one from the main star seller.
mcp.TripleStarDiscountVoucherDescription: Allows you to buy three stars at a time for the cost of one from the main star seller.
mcp.ThornedSpiritShieldDescription: Passive ability. Upon activation protects you from the next player that tries to steal a Star or Coins from you. Any player that attempts to steal coins will instead lose the coins that they would have otherwise stolen.
mcp.CandyCannon2Description: Launches you even closer to the Star Seller than the normal Candy Cannon.
mcp.SandyCannon2Description: Launches you even closer to the Star/Ztar Seller than the normal Sandy Cannon.
mcp.TreasureBagDescription: Instantly gives you three random enhanced items. Can receive any item in the game except for Star Counterfeiters, Cuckoo Clocks, Star Vouchers.
mcp.BinaryDiceDescription: Player can only roll 0-1 for their next roll. Can be activated on any player.
mcp.BigMagicDiceDescription: Allows you to choose how many spaces you or another player will move on their next turn. Can choose any number 1-20.
mcp.CuckooClockDescription1: Select the next turn number. Choose any turn between the last 7 turns and the last 3 turns. Runs a special event after the current turn is over. Only one player can hold a Crazy Clock or Cuckoo Clock at a time.
mcp.CuckooClockDescription2: Increases the number Stars to win by 2 if a special event has occurred. Decreases the number of Stars to win by 2 if a special event has not occurred. Only one player can hold a Crazy Clock or Cuckoo Clock at a time.
mcp.PocketPlundererDescription2: Coins from every player that you pass and that passes you on the board. Expires after 3 turns.
mcp.TurnStealerDescription: Steal another player's turn of your choice. Your turn will start at their spot and you will move their pawn.
mcp.StarSupplierDescription1: Teleports you to the main star seller and gives you any coins needed to buy a star.
mcp.StarSupplierDescription2: Teleports you to the closest main star seller and gives you any coins needed to buy a star.
mcp.StarSupplierDescription3: Teleports you to the closest main star seller and gives you any coins needed to buy an additional star.
mcp.AnvilDeathTrapDescription: Any foe that lands on this trap gives the trap setter half of their coins (minimum of 10).
mcp.FreezeTrapDescription: Any foe that crosses this trap gets frozen in place, sets their roll set to 0, and nullifies the space below it. Expires after 2 uses.
mcp.StarSetterDescription: Choose one of 4 places to set the star seller.
mcp.StarSetterDescription1: Choose one of 4 places to set the star seller.
mcp.StarSetterDescription2: Choose one of 4 places to set the star seller furthest away from you.
mcp.StarCounterfeiterDescription: Steals one star from a player of your choice and duplicates it. Bonus stars unaffected by this item.
mcp.StarSafeDescription: Makes two of your stars permanently yours for the remainder of the game. Players can still steal unprotected stars.
mcp.TwinionPetsDescription: Summons two minions where you stand. Split your roll between two additional pawns by swapping places with either minion when traversing the board. Land on both minions' spaces and your own space. Adds 2 to your roll.
mcp.TrafficControllerDescription: Switches the traffic lights and keeps them locked that way until your next turn.
mcp.FreeverserDescription: Allows you to move in any direction on your turn. You can change directions only when you reach an intersection.
mcp.NotEnoughCoins: You do not have enough coins to buy a
mcp.NotEnoughCoins2: You do not have enough coins to buy an
mcp.ArcaneAtollStarSchmooverDescription: Moves both the Star Seller and the Imposter Star Seller to new random locations.
mcp.ArcaneAtollStarSetterDescription: Choose one of 4 places to move a random Star Seller. The other Star Seller gets moved to a random space.
mcp.CandyCannonReverseDescription: Launches you closer to the start of the board.
mcp.CandyCannon2ReverseDescription: Launches you even closer to the start of the board.
mcp.SandyCannonReverseDescription: Launches you closer to the start of the board.
mcp.SandyCannon2ReverseDescription: Launches you even closer to the start of the board.
mcp.music_disc_challenge_description: You will play on the lower ledge in the middle of this board. The skeleton's arrow will instantly kill the creeper. Line yourself up so the skeleton shoots the creeper without getting too close to the creeper. Be careful as your health is limited. If you fall off you lose.
mcp.elder_guardian_fight_description: You will receive a trident that comes back to you after you throw it. You will ride an axolotl which will go towards where you're facing. Shoot the elder guardian (gray one) with your trident to deal damage. The elder guardian spawns a drowned minion periodically. Never get too close to the guardian.
mcp.paint_cube_challenge_description: A design will spawn in the glass when you click the start sign. Copy the design within 40 seconds to beat the challenge and win 15 coins! You will be given leather boots. Step over a wool color to color your boots. Your boots will recolor the blocks in the square that you step over. To change the color of your boots, step on a new wool color.
mcp.cannon_defuser_description: There are 6 buttons. One of them triggers a bomb. You will be given a diffuser that can deactivate 4 buttons. Once you step in, you will have 20 seconds to break 4 buttons. If one of the 4 buttons that you break is the bomb, you will receive 10 coins for defusing the bomb. Otherwise, you will lose 10 coins if you guess incorrectly. Tip: Mine the buttons using the diffuser item. DO NOT press them!
mcp.picnic_panic_description: I will list 7-9 items (in the title) that you must grab from the barrel and drop them in the picnic basket (composter). You may drop them in any order. Click me again to confirm and I will award you with 15 coins if all the items (no more or less) are in the basket.
mcp.ctf_flag_title: Break flag with sword to pick it up
mcp.TicketStarDescription1: This star is awarded to a random player/team's ticket at the end of the game
mcp.GoldenStarDescription: This star is awarded to the player/team with the highest maximum coins held during the game at any time
mcp.EventStarDescription: This star is awarded to the player/team with the most number of events triggered
mcp.RunnerStarDescription: This star is awarded to the player/team with the most spaces moved

mcp.raw_steak_expire: Your raw steak expired and you lost it
mcp.raw_fish_expire: Your raw fish expired and you lost it
mcp.award_racing_star.generic.solo: is awarded to the first player to complete the most laps on the board. A player is considered to have completed a lap each time they cross the start of the board.
mcp.award_racing_star.generic.team: is awarded to the first team to complete the most laps on the board. A player is considered to have completed a lap each time they cross the start of the board.
mcp.SpectatorVoidMessage: This minigame is played in spectator mode. Click here to void minigame if needed.
mcp.DropToPractice: Drop To Go To Practice Mode
mcp.DropPracticeLore1: Drop item to start practice mode.
mcp.ColorBeg: You can beg that player to select a different color if you really want this one.
mcp.RandomColorInfo: You will be assigned a random color at the start of the game
mcp.TooManyPlayers: There are too many players on the
mcp.TeamsModeCheck: Teams Mode requires an even number of players to be playing.
mcp.SwapThisQuadrant: Swap This Quadrant (Look at quadrant and drop this item)
mcp.SuitShufflerDescription: Swap the locations of one quadrant of your choice and a random different quadrant.
mcp.SuitSwitcherDescription: Swap the locations of two quadrants of your choice.
mcp.RoyalStarDescription: This star is awarded to the player/team that alternates traveling between red and black quadrants the highest number of times when traversing the board.
mcp.TeamsModeCheck2: Teams Mode requies at least 4 players to be playing.
mcp.TrophyNote: Note: Chestplate awards 1 extra coin. Boots awards 1 less coin.
mcp.ItemRecoveryNote: Note: Chestplate gives 3% additional recovery chance. Boots gives 3% less recovery chance.
mcp.SuperstarNote: Note: Chestplate and leggings give a small chance for additional star shards.
mcp.EnderNote: Note: Chestplate and leggings allow for shorter wait to use after acquiring.
mcp.trophy_upgrade: Awards additional coins for winning minigames
mcp.bling_upgrade: Awards additional coins for landing on blue/yellow spaces
mcp.speedy_upgrade: Increases dice range by 1 per upgrade
mcp.superstar_upgrade: +0.5 star shards forged per star transaction per upgrade
mcp.ender_upgrade: +1 space choice to warp to per upgrade
mcp.PickpocketerDescription: Passive ability. Upon activation, steals coins from every player you pass on the board. Expires after 3 turns.
mcp.PocketPlundererDescription: Passive ability. Upon activation, steals coins from every player you pass and that passes you on the board. Expires after 3 turns.
mcp.StepOnBeacon: You must step on the beacon to teleport
mcp.ViewBoardLore: Drop to go above the board. Offhand to go into Spectator Mode.
mcp.TeleportToTurnPlayerLore: Teleports you to the player taking their turn. Drop to use.
mcp.SacrificialEnchantmentShardDescripti: Used to enhance luck at sacrificial alter
mcp.UltimateBladeOfDoomLore1: Return to Lucas in sandstone house near lava pit.
mcp.CodLore1: Return to Jeff in small oak wood house
mcp.StrengthPotionDescription: Drink potion right before pulling diamond sword in black bastion.
mcp.FireResistancePotionLore: Use to swim in lava pit safely and find lost netherite scrap.
mcp.RawBeefLore1: Cook beef using coal in any oven around the map before it expires.
mcp.SteakLore1: Return to Arnold in mud brick house.
mcp.EnderEyeLore1: Use to activate portal in end dungeon in mesa cave.
mcp.EnderEyeLore2: Reward: Double coins for blue/yellow spots and immunity from red/black spots
mcp.IronPickaxeLore: Use to mine emerald ore in mesa cave.
mcp.SacredEmerladLore1: Return to Barry on side of savana island.
mcp.BowlLore: Use with dandelion to acquire suspicious stew.
mcp.DandelionLore: Feed to brown cow, then use bowl to acquire suspicious stew.
mcp.SuspiciousStewLore1: Return to Skylar in birch wood house.
mcp.MineYourBusinessGlowInfo: You feel yourself getting brighter. So bright that you can be seen through walls.
mcp.StarFragmentInstruction: Return the star fragment to the wizard hut earn a star. Star fragment can be stolen by passing whoever has the item.
mcp.MoodHatLore: What kind of mood will you be in today?
mcp.DropToEndMinigame: Drop to end current minigame in progress
mcp.GoldRushSpeedBootsLore: Equip to get a temporary speed boost!
mcp.GoldRUshJumpBootsLore: Equip to get a temporary jump boost!
mcp.ReturnToSpotLore: Drop to go back to your spot. Offhand to go into Spectator Mode.
mcp.StarFragmentLore: Right click on Arcane Wizard to receive star
mcp.aa_brush_tick.1: %1$s Hello explorer. Want to find some treasure? You may use this brush once. Digging sand can give you%2$sand digging gravel can give you %3$s You have one brush so choose wisely! Hold down %4$s to brush the block.
mcp.aa_call_phantom.1: You do not have enough coins to fly across
mcp.aa_drowned_tick.1: %1$s fended off the bog monsters and won %2$s
mcp.aa_drowned_tick.2: %1$s did not beat the bog monster shooting challenge.
mcp.aa_magenta_event.1: %1$s Shop items are now 50%% off for the next two turns!
mcp.aa_magenta_event.2: %1$s Shop items are 50%% off for two more turns!
mcp.aa_magenta_event.3: %1$s items have spawned across the map!
mcp.aa_magenta_event.4: %1$s 5 small Coin Piles have spawned across the map.
mcp.aa_magenta_event.5: %1$s For the next two turns, all rolls now grant +3 spaces!
mcp.aa_magenta_event.6: %1$s For an additional two turns, all rolls grant +3 spaces!
mcp.aa_magenta_event.7: A star fragment has spawned on the map! Pick it up and return it to the wizard hut to receive a star!
mcp.aa_magenta_event.8: %1$s The %2$s is now offering two %3$s for the price of one only for the next player that buys one!
mcp.aa_magenta_event.9: %1$s The %2$s is extending its two %3$s for the price of one deal for an additional visitor!
mcp.aa_magenta_event.10: %1$sThe next player to land on yellow will receive a bonus item. The next player to land on black will get sent back to the start of the board.
mcp.aa_magenta_event.11: %1$s Each player has a new random trap spawned in a random spot on the board!
mcp.aa_magenta_event.12: Two pairs of teleporters have spawned for the next two turns.
mcp.aa_magenta_event.13: Two pairs of teleporters are now here for an additional two turns.
mcp.aa_magenta_event.17.8: Note: Warp To Stars will teleport you to the nearest star seller regardless of whether it's real.
mcp.aa_magenta_event.17: %1$s The main %2$s has moved and an %3$s has spawned! The %4$s looks like the original but doesn't sell a %5$s. It will go away once a %6$s is bought from the main %7$s.%8$s
mcp.aa_magenta_event.18: %1$s Shop items now cost 50%% more for the next two turns!
mcp.aa_magenta_event.19: %1$s Shop items cost 50%% more for two more turns!
mcp.aa_magenta_event.20: %1$s For the next two turns, Trolls have taken over! Roll higher than them to pass or your turn ends!
mcp.aa_magenta_event.21: %1$s For an additional two turns, Trolls have taken over! Roll higher than them to pass or your turn ends!
mcp.aa_magenta_event.25: %1$s Items cannot be used for one turn!
mcp.aa_magenta_event.26: %1$s Items are unusable for an additional turn!
mcp.aa_magenta_event.28: %1$s%2$s star shards have spawned across the board.
mcp.aa_map_troll_end_roll.1: %1$sAh, you bested me! Right this way.
mcp.aa_map_troll_end_roll.2: %1$sSorry, you failed to roll higher than me. Now you're stuck.
mcp.aa_map_troll_tick.2: %1$sAyo, if you want to get past me, you must roll higher than me. Or you can pay me %2$s and I will let you past.
mcp.aa_map_troll_tick.3:
Right click the troll to continue 
or 
Drop your %1$s to pay the fee
mcp.aa_map_troll_tick.4: You do not have enough coins to bypass the troll
mcp.aa_next_turn.3: Deflation has ended! The 50% item discount is now gone.
mcp.aa_next_turn.6: Inflation has ended! The +50% item cost is now gone.
mcp.aa_next_turn.16: %1$s turns until the %2$s go to sleep!
mcp.aa_next_turn.18: The trolls have gone to sleep!
mcp.aa_next_turn.19: %1$sYou can use your %2$s to bypass the Trolls.
mcp.aa_next_turn.20: %1$sYou can use your %2$s to bypass the Trolls.
mcp.aa_parkour_tick.1: %1$s did not beat the dripleaf parkour.
mcp.aa_parkour_tick.2: %1$s beat the dripleaf parkour and won %2$s
mcp.aa_pass_spot.1: %1$s Hello adventurer! Need a quick way across the water? I can help you with that for the mere cost of %2$s golden smackers.
mcp.aa_pass_spot.2: %1$s Sorry, I cannot offer you a ride. The phantom is on the opposite side of the lagoon.
mcp.aa_pass_spot.4: %1$s Hello adventurer! Need a quick way across the water? I can help you with that for the mere cost of %2$s golden smackers.
mcp.aa_pass_spot.5: %1$s Sorry, I cannot offer you a ride. The phantom is on the opposite side of the lagoon.
mcp.aa_pass_spot.7: %1$s Hello traveler. With my magic, I can build a fragile dripleaf parkour. Reach the top, grab the %2$s and come back to win them. The water is toxic so make sure not to fall in. Also, the dripleaves stay up for only 1 second after stepping on them, so be quick!
mcp.aa_pass_spot.8: %1$s Ahoy matey! Those bog monsters are after me loot again! Here is a crossbow with 5 arrows. Use it to take care of them. But you can only miss one shot. And their arrows kill you in 1 shot, so be careful! Kill them for me and I will reward you with %2$s
mcp.aa_pass_spot.9: %1$s Hello adventurer! Can I hook you up with some items?
mcp.aa_random_item.1: %1$s has received a %2$s from the extra luck event!

mcp.approach_wizard_hut.1: %1$sWelcome to my wizard hut where you can cast a variety of spells. Step right up and choose one of three spells you want to cast by pressing the button.%2$s
mcp.approach_wizard_hut.2: %1$s Shop items cost 50%% less for the next 2 turns.
mcp.approach_wizard_hut.4: %1$s 5 Coin piles spawn worth 4-7 coins each.
mcp.approach_wizard_hut.5: %1$s Players' rolls increase by 3 for the next two turns
mcp.approach_wizard_hut.6: %1$s Star Fragment spawns on the board. First player to bring it to the wizard hut earns a star. You can steal the fragment by passing the owner of the fragment.
mcp.approach_wizard_hut.7: %1$s Next star bought from the main star seller earns a free additional star.
mcp.approach_wizard_hut.8: %1$s Next player to land on yellow receives a bonus item and next player to land on black gets sent back to the start.
mcp.approach_wizard_hut.9: %1$s Every player gets a random trap placed on the board in a random spot.
mcp.approach_wizard_hut.10: %1$s Two pairs of teleporters spawn on the map for two turns.
mcp.approach_wizard_hut.11: %1$s Three players (other than the current turn player) will swap positions with each other.
mcp.approach_wizard_hut.12: %1$s Main star seller moves and a new fake one spawns that does not get removed until a star is bought from the real seller.
mcp.approach_wizard_hut.13: %1$s Shop items cost 50%% more for the next two turns.
mcp.approach_wizard_hut.14: %1$s Three trolls spawn across the map for a turn. You must roll higher than them to proceed or your turn ends.
mcp.approach_wizard_hut.15: %1$s For the next turn, items are unusable.
mcp.approach_wizard_hut.16: %1$s Each player loses one random item that they own.
mcp.approach_wizard_hut.17: %1$s%2$s Star shards spawn across the board.
mcp.arcane_atoll_cutscene.1:
Would you like to get an overview of the board?
%1$s %2$s
mcp.arcane_atoll_cutscene.2: %1$sArcane Atoll is a board on a magical island.
mcp.arcane_atoll_cutscene.3: %1$sThe %2$s on this board sells 1 %3$s for the cost of 20 %4$s. The star seller moves after a star gets bought.
mcp.arcane_atoll_cutscene.4: %1$sThis board has 15 unique spells that can be cast. Each spell changes the game in ways that can be beneficial or detrimental to players.
mcp.arcane_atoll_cutscene.5: %1$sEntering the %2$s hut gives you the option to choose one of three random spells to cast for free.
mcp.arcane_atoll_cutscene.6: %1$sLanding on a magenta space will cast a random spell.
mcp.arcane_atoll_cutscene.7: %1$sThe %2$s for this board is awarded to the player that casts the most spells. Spells cast through both the %3$s hut and from landing on %4$s count for this %5$s.
mcp.arcane_atoll_cutscene.8: %1$sPay a %2$s a visit and for the cost of 7 %3$s, they will call on their phantom to transport you to the opposite island. Beware that you can only ride the phantom if it is on the same island as you.
mcp.arcane_atoll_cutscene.9: %1$sDig up a sand or gravel block in this challenge and you may find yourself some hidden loot.
mcp.arcane_atoll_cutscene.10: %1$sDefeat the Bog Monsters in this challenge as they try to take over a shipwreck and you will be rewarded with 10 %2$s.
mcp.arcane_atoll_cutscene.11: %1$sIf you beat the Dripleaf Parkour Challenge, %2$s will reward you handsomely with 10 %3$s.
mcp.arcane_atoll_description.1:
%1$sThis board has magical spells that can make gameplay chaotic. Spells are activated by passing the Wizard Hut where you can choose one of three spells or by landing on a %2$s where a random event spell will occur. Spells can do all sorts of things to impact gameplay such as changing the price of shop items, spawning items on the board, increasing player rolls and much more.

%3$sThere are three challenges on the board that you can attempt to earn coins.

%4$sPass by them and they will send the mystical phantom to carry you over the lagoon for a cost of 7 coins, but the phantom can only be on one side of the lagoon at a time.

%5$sThe bonus star for this board is the Spell Caster Star and is awarded to the player that casts the mosts spells either through the wizard hut or magenta spaces.

mcp.bombs_away.3: The TNT will fly in the direction that you are facing.

Would you like to get an overview of the board?
%1$s %2$s
mcp.candyland_cutscene.2: %1$sCandyland is a linear board that has tricks and challenges that offer SWEET rewards.
mcp.candyland_cutscene.3: %1$sThe %2$s is positioned on top of the cake at the center of the board. There are multiple paths that can be taken to reach here, each with different tradeoffs. When reaching the %3$s, you can buy a single %4$s for 20 %5$s. If you cannot afford a %6$s, the %7$s will automagically send you back to the start. The star seller does not move after a star gets bought.
mcp.candyland_cutscene.4: %1$sTake a visit to Chester's Humble Abode. Sometimes he is grumpy. Depending on his mood, he will either give you a hearty treat, or play you for a fool.
mcp.candyland_cutscene.5: %1$sVisiting Bew lets you steal 5-10 %2$s (for free) or steal a %3$s (for 50 %4$s) from another player of your choice.
mcp.candyland_cutscene.6: %1$sLanding on this magenta space will melt the ice cream opening up the blocked path next to it. If the path is already open, the ice cream above it will melt and block off the path.
mcp.candyland_cutscene.7: %1$sLanding on this magenta space will switch which path in the chocolate biome is open.
mcp.candyland_cutscene.8: %1$sThe %2$s for this board is awarded to the player that spends the most cumulative %3$s in the shops.
mcp.candyland_cutscene.11: %1$sVisit the %2$s's house and complete the challenge by retriving the honey bottle. The honey bottle item is the reward.
mcp.candyland_description.1: %1$sThe Star Seller is at the center of the board on top of the cake and does not move. When you reach the end of the board, you will get sent back to the start if you buy a Star or select the "<RETURN TO START>" option for buying a Star. If you can't afford a Star, you will automatically be sent back to the start. The board specific star goes to the player that spends the most coins in the shops.

mcp.center_park_approach_slot_machine.1: %1$s Step right up! Step right up! Test your skills on the slot machine and earn a sweet reward if you match three of a kind in the middle row within 30 seconds!
mcp.center_park_board_description.1: %1$sCenter park is a board that takes place in a city surrounding an urban park. In this city, you travel on the right side of the road. When entering an intersection, there are always two exits available. Right away, the East and West exits at every intersection are open. When a player lands on a magenta spot these exits close and the North and South exits open. The exit states swap every time a player lands on a magenta spot.
mcp.center_park_bonus_star_description.1: %1$sThis board features a Ticket Bonus Star. At the end of the game, a random ticket that has been bought by any player will be selected. The owner of that ticket receives the bonus star. Tickets can be bought from the two Ticket Masters on the board.
mcp.center_park_coin_rob_end.1: %1$s did not beat the coin robbing challenge.
mcp.center_park_coin_rob_end.2: %1$s completed the coin robbing challenge and won %2$s%3$s.
mcp.center_park_coin_rob_tick.1: %1$sHere's a master key to this apartment building that unlocks every room. You have 30 seconds to collect as many coins as possible in the building. If the time runs out and you are still in the building, you win nothing. Higher floors have more coins.
mcp.center_park_coin_rob_tick.3: Right click door with key to start challenge
mcp.center_park_cutscene.1:
Would you like to get an overview of the board?
%1$s %2$s
mcp.center_park_cutscene.2: %1$sCenter park is a board that takes place in a city surrounding an urban park. In this city, you travel on the right side of the road.
mcp.center_park_cutscene.3: %1$sThis board has two %2$s active at all times with each of them selling a %3$s for 20 %4$s. The star seller moves after a star gets bought.
mcp.center_park_cutscene.4: %1$sWhen entering an intersection, there are always two exits available. Only the exits with the traffic lights in the %2$s state are able taken. The exits with the blockades are not able to be taken. Right away, the East and West exits at every intersection are open.
mcp.center_park_cutscene.5: %1$sWhen a player lands on a magenta space, the East and West exits close and the North and South exits open. The exit states swap every time a player lands on a magenta spot.
mcp.center_park_cutscene.6: %1$sTickets can be bought by visiting a Ticket Master each located at one of the two Casinos on the board. At the end of the game, a random ticket that has been bought by any player will be selected. The owner of that ticket receives the bonus star. Each ticket cost 1 %2$s and you can buy as many as you can afford per visit to a Casino.
mcp.center_park_cutscene.7: %1$sAdditionally, you can use tolls to get inside the park which can help you get across the board quicker and easier. Using a toll costs 5 %2$s.
mcp.center_park_cutscene.8: %1$s%2$s and %3$s can be used to take any exit in an intersection as well as go through the tolls without paying.
mcp.center_park_cutscene.9: %1$sTest your skills on the Slot Machine! Match 3 in a row for a nice cash prize.
mcp.center_park_cutscene.10: %1$sTry out your thievery skills in this challenge! Don't be slow or you will get locked in the building.
mcp.center_park_cutscene.11: %1$sMr. P loves chilling in the park and gambling! Try to take advantage of this and see if you can win some money off of him.
mcp.center_park_enter_toll.1: You don't have enough coins to enter through the path.

mcp.dusty_dunes_cutscene.2:
Would you like to get an overview of the board?
%1$s %2$s
mcp.dusty_dunes_cutscene.3: %1$s%2$s is a linear desert themed board that has two different board states.
mcp.dusty_dunes_cutscene.4: %1$sStarting off, the board takes place in the daytime. In this state of the board only, you can buy one %2$s when you reach the oasis at the end. %3$s are bought from the %4$s for the cost of 20 %5$s. Passing the %6$s will send you back to the start and switch the board to night time regardless of you buying a %7$s. The %8$s does not move after a %9$s gets bought.
mcp.dusty_dunes_cutscene.5: %1$sDuring the day time, the majority of the spaces on the board are blue, with no red spaces being present.
mcp.dusty_dunes_cutscene.6: %1$sIf you pass in front of %2$s during the day time, he will give you a random reward.
mcp.dusty_dunes_cutscene.7: %1$sThe %2$s takes place of the %3$s during the night time. Approaching the %4$s will punish you with a %5$s, which will destroy one of your %6$s. If you do not have a %7$s, the %8$s will steal 20 %9$s instead. You will also get sent back to the start and the board will switch to day time. The %10$s does not move after being approached.
mcp.dusty_dunes_cutscene.8: %1$sDuring the night time, the blue spaces on the board get swapped to red spaces.
mcp.dusty_dunes_cutscene.9: %1$sIf you pass in front of %2$s during the night time, he will give you a random punishment.
mcp.dusty_dunes_cutscene.10: %1$sWhen the board switches to the night time state, any %2$s on the board get turned into %3$s which will steal a %4$s from you if you pass them.
mcp.dusty_dunes_cutscene.11: %1$s%2$s and %3$s can be used to bypass the %4$s and %5$s without losing anything and skip past Spike the Cactus (for both day and night). Skipping past the %6$s will toggle the board back to day time.
mcp.dusty_dunes_cutscene.12: %1$sLanding on a magenta space that has a clock and bookshelves next to it will toggle the daytime state of the board.
mcp.dusty_dunes_cutscene.13: %1$sLanding on a magenta space with dynamite next to it will ignite the dynamite which will blow up and launch you back to the start.
mcp.dusty_dunes_cutscene.14: %1$sPassing by a pyramid will give the you the ability to warp to the next pyramid for the cost of 7 %2$s.
mcp.dusty_dunes_cutscene.15: %1$sPassing a temple gives you the opportunity to complete a challenge and earn %2$s. Each temple consists of three randomly selected temple stages. Each temple stage is its own mini challenge which can range from parkour, treasure finding, navigating a maze, fighting monsters and more. If you get to the end, you will receive 15 %3$s plus 5 bonus %4$s if you complete it without taking any damage.
mcp.dusty_dunes_cutscene.16: %1$sThe %2$s for this board is awarded to the player that completes the most temple stages.
mcp.dusty_dunes_description.1:
%1$sThis board has two phases; night and day. Day/Night can change when the player lands on a magenta clock space or by reaching the end of the board.

%2$s The %3$s sells a %4$sfor 20 %5$s during the day. But beware! Druing the night, the %6$s takes the place of the star seller and will destroy one of your stars (or 20 coins if you do not have a star) when passed. Ghost mode can be used to bypass the Ztar Seller without penalty.

%7$s Spaces next to a mini clock tower will change the day/night phase when landed on. Spaces next to TNT will launch you back to the start when landed on.

%8$sThere are two temples on the board that you can attempt and reward 15 %9$s if completed or 20 %10$s if completed without taking any damage. Each temple has three randomly generated stages.

%11$sThe bonus star for this board is the %12$s. It is awarded to the player that completes the most temple stages.

mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.1: %1$s Bring me back my netherite scrap that I dropped in the lava pit. Here is a fire resistance potion to help you, but be careful as it only lasts for 30 seconds. If you successfully retrieve it, I will award you with a star.%2$s
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.2:
%1$s%2$s
Click on Mason to accept this quest.

Hello young adventurer. Boy something crazy happened to me! I recently dropped a valuable piece of netherite in the lava pit in the desert. It was something I've had for a while. My very first ancient debris I found is that. Well nevermind the fact that my uncle has given me hundreds of acient debris for my birthdays. I am 209 in villager years. Can you believe it? And I get one every time! Do not tell him I lost this. The netherite scrap is the pit in the red sand area. I couldn't tell you exactly where it is in the pit. It changes every time I go there. The lava flows a lot so it could be anywhere. If you can retrieve it for me, I will reward you with a star. Now that sounds like a deal doesn't it? Nothing to lose. Everything to gain. This potion should help you with the lava, but be careful! It only lasts for 30 seconds. If you burn up, you will lose some coins and are not allowed to try again until you get back. I can only give you one potion because of how few I have, but hopefully that is all you will need. Be quick. Get there before someone else retrieves it first. I'm Counting on you!
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.3.2: Click on Mason to receive another potion.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.3: %1$s Do you have my netherite scrap? I can give you another fire resistance potion if you need one.%2$s

mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.4: %1$s Thank you for returning my item. As promised, here is your star.%2$s
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.5: %1$s Thanks again for returning my item to me.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.6: %1$s My needs have been taken care of by another player.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.7.2: Click on Lucas to accept this quest.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.7: %1$s I have been seeking the ultimate diamond blade. It is located in the black bastion that you just passed. The problem is that it is stuck inside the rock. You will need this potion to pull it out. If you bring the blade to me, I will award you a voucher than can be used to buy two stars at once when crossing the main star seller.%2$s

mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.11: %1$s My needs have been taken care of by another player.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.12: %1$s Thieves have stolen a drink from my stand. The drink is at (1136,20,122) in the sandstone structure on the opposite corner of the map. If you retrieve it for me, I will reward you with 25 coins. But if you want the reward, make sure to grab the drink before someone else gets there!
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.13.2: Click on Tim to claim your reward.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.13: %1$s Thank you for retrieving me my drink back. Those thieves will pay. But for now, here is your 25 coins I promised you earlier.%2$s
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.14: %1$s Thanks again for bringing my item.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.15: %1$s My needs have been taken care of by another player.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.16.2: Click on Arnold to accept this quest.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.16: %1$s I need to cook this steak but my oven is broken! Would you take this raw beef and cook it for me in one of my neighbors' houses? I have coal for you to use. I will reward you if you bring me back a cooked steak. The raw beef expires in 5 turns. As a reward, I have a magic dice, a player swapper, and a thrice dice lying around. I only have one of each.%2$s
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.17.2: Click on Arnold to receive another raw steak.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.17: %1$s Have you cooked the steak yet? I can give you another raw steak that I have.%2$s
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.18.2: Thank you for cooking my steak. Please choose a reward below:
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.18:
%1$s%2$s
Choose an item by clicking it in chat then click on Arnold to claim your reward.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.21: %1$s Thanks again for cooking my steak for me.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.22.2: Click on Greg to accept this quest.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.22: %1$s Hey adventurer. I have a secret. I have this eye of ender. What the other villagers don't know is that if you activate the portal down in the cave, you will get supernatural luck! This means you will be immune to red and black spots and get double coin payouts from blue and yellow spots. %2$s
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.23: %1$s Still working on filling the portal I see...
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.24: %1$s I see that you have activated the portal. Nice job! I have nothing else for you.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.26.3: Click on Jeff to accept this quest.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.26: %1$s I have a quick chore you could do for me. You can catch a cod in the pond and bring it back to me. You must catch a cod. I will provide you a fishing rod, but it only has two uses left. The cod will go bad if you don't bring it back within four turns after catching it. I will reward you with a %2$s.%3$s
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.27.2: Click on Jeff to receive another fishing rod.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.27: %1$s Have you caught the fish yet? I can give you another rod if you need one. No more than one at a time though.%2$s
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.28.2: Click Jeff to claim your reward.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.28: %1$s Thank you for bringing me a fish. As promised, here is your warp to star.%2$s
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.29: %1$s Thanks again for catching me a fish.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.30.2: Click on Barry to accept this quest.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.30: %1$s Howdy! There are a couple sacred emeralds hidden in the ravine in the mesa badlands island, But it is too dangerous for me to go there. If you went down there for me, and mined one of the ores and brought it back, I will reward you with a star.%2$s
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.31: %1$s Still working on mining the ore I see.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.32.2: Click on Barry to claim your reward.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.32: %1$s Thank you for obtaining the emerald. I like emeralds as you can probably tell. As promised, here is your star.%2$s
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.33: %1$s Thanks again for collecting the emerald.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.34: %1$s My needs have been taken care of by other players.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.35.2: Click on Skylar to accept this quest.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.35: %1$s I'm hungry and I have a craving for some stew. Some suspicious stew. I have a flower and a bowl. If you can go to the mushroom island, and feed the brown cow the flower and milk it, you will get the stew that I want. I will give you 25 coins if you come back with that type of stew. Sorry for sounding demanding; you aren't you when you're hungry.%2$s
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.36: %1$s Have you collected the suspicious stew yet?
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.37.2: Click on Skylar to claim your reward.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.37: %1$s Thank you for obtaining the stew. Here is your reward.%2$s
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.38: %1$s Thanks again for getting the stew for me.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.39.2: Click on Chancellor to accept this quest.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.39: %1$s Psssssst. Hey there adventurer. The underground altar has a secret. It is located at below the desert teleporter. The secret is that you can drop this enchantment shard in the altar before sacrificing your coins. This will make your sacrifice more powerful and can award you with more and better items!%2$s
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.40:
%1$s%2$s
Click on Chancellor to restock enchantment shard.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.41: %1$s I see that you're still making progress towards making it to the altar.
mcp.fi_quest_dialogue.42: %1$s You already have a sacrificial enchantment shard. Use it first before I can give you another one.

mcp.floating_islands_cutscene.1:
Would you like to get an overview of the board?
%1$s %2$s
mcp.floating_islands_cutscene.2: %1$sThis board has quests that you can complete for various rewards as well as other fun gimmicks.
mcp.floating_islands_cutscene.3: %1$sThe %2$s on this board sells 1 %3$s for the cost of 20 %4$s. The star seller moves after a star gets bought.
mcp.floating_islands_cutscene.4: %1$sQuests can be started by talking to a villager in a house. Quest related items can be viewed by dropping your quest barrel item. Green signs point to villagers where you can start quests.
mcp.floating_islands_cutscene.5: %1$sWhen someone lands on a magenta spot, all players' pawns will move to a random space on the map.
mcp.floating_islands_cutscene.6: %1$sAdditionally, there are three teleporters across the board. You can use them on your turn to teleport to any of the other teleporters in the board for a cost of 7 %2$s.
mcp.floating_islands_cutscene.7: %1$s Located beneath the desert teleporter, the Sacrificial Altar can be used to get big heaps of items. When visiting, drop your %2$s into the altar and then click the button on the wall to confirm your sacrifice.
mcp.floating_islands_cutscene.8: %1$sThe board specific star for this board is awarded to the first player who completes the most laps. A player completes a lap each time they pass the checkered spot (the one that all players spawn at). A tie in number of laps completed will award the Racing Star to the player(s) that completed their last lap earlier.
mcp.floating_islands_description.1: %1$sThis board has quests that you can complete for various rewards. Quests can be started by talking to a villager in a house. Quest related items can be viewed by dropping your quest barrel item when it is your turn. Green signs point to villagers where you can start quests.
mcp.floating_islands_description.2: %1$sThe board specific star for this board is the racing star. This star is awarded to the first player to complete the most laps. You complete a lap each time you pass the checkered spot (the one that all players spawn at).
mcp.floating_islands_description.3: %1$sWhen someone lands on a magenta spot, each player's spot will move to a random space on the map.
mcp.floating_islands_description.4: %1$sThe sacrificial altar is located underground in the deep desert area. Sacrifice some coins into the altar for a reward (or even multiple rewards).
mcp.fort_suits_copper_tick.1: %1$s did not beat the copper hunt challenge.
mcp.fort_suits_copper_tick.2: %1$s found the copper ingot and won %2$s%3$s
mcp.fort_suits_cutscene.1:
Would you like to get an overview of the board?
%1$s %2$s
mcp.fort_suits_cutscene.2: %1$s%2$s%3$s%4$sis a board game themed board. The board is split up into four quadrants, each themed after one of the four card suits.
mcp.fort_suits_cutscene.3: %1$sThis board features a karma system. Each player has both a Positive Karma (good karma) and Negative Karma (bad karma) score. Karma can be thought of as an additional currency with each of them capping at 10.
mcp.fort_suits_cutscene.4: %1$sPositive Karma () can be acquired by performing good deed actions that involve interacting with NPCs in a way that's favorable to them (buying a merchant's items, paying dues to the Diamond Queen, beating a challenge and enhancing or duplicating an item) as well as triggering a green space.
mcp.fort_suits_cutscene.5: %1$sNegative Karma () can be acquired by performing actions that involve interacting with NPCs or other players in a way that's unfavorable to them (skipping a merchant's shop, not paying dues to the Diamond Queen when entering the Diamond quadrant, passing a challenge without attempting it, using an item against another player, pickingpocketing and placing a trap) as well as triggering duels, battle minigames and chance time.
mcp.fort_suits_cutscene.6: %1$sThis board has two %2$s active at all times. There will always be one Star Seller in a red quadrant (Hearts or Diamonds) and one in a black quadrant (Clubs or Spades).
mcp.fort_suits_cutscene.7: %1$sThe Star Seller in the red quadrant will sell a Star at a base cost of 30 Coins and offers options that discount the Coin cost by having the player spend their Positive Karma ().
mcp.fort_suits_cutscene.8: %1$sThe Star Seller in the black quadrant will sell a Star at a base cost of 30 Coins and offers options that discount the Coin cost by having the player spend their Negative Karma ().
mcp.fort_suits_cutscene.9: %1$sAfter buying a Star, the Star Seller that you bought from will move to the quadrant of the other suit of the same color.
mcp.fort_suits_cutscene.10: %1$sSacrifice your Positive Karma () here and get awarded with random items. The more karma sacrificed, the better the chances of getting more and better items!
mcp.fort_suits_cutscene.11: %1$sSacrifice your Negative Karma () here. You can visit any spirit to acquire an item of your choosing at the expense of your Negative Karma (). Limit of 1 item per visit.
mcp.fort_suits_cutscene.12: %1$sVisit %2$s to enhance or duplicate any item. The cost of enhancement is 25%% the base price of the item and duplication is 50%% of the base price but is 75%% for enhanced items. %3$s allows a limit of 1 visit per turn.
mcp.fort_suits_cutscene.13: %1$sYou must pay 8 %2$s to enter the diamonds quadrant. Paying the full amount gives you 1 Positive Karma (). Failure to pay will result in you losing the rest of your turn but gives you 1 Negative Karma (). %3$s and %4$s allow you to pass the guards without paying and gives you 1 Negative Karma ().
mcp.fort_suits_cutscene.14: %1$sWhen you pass %2$s, he will judge how good you've been based on your net karma (Positive Karma () minus Negative Karma ()). %3$s rewards players better with higher net karma and punishes players with lower net karma. %4$s and %5$s will make you invisible to Freyr and you will avoid his judgement.
mcp.fort_suits_cutscene.15: %1$sYou will have 15 seconds to find the copper ingot in the stash of jewels. If you collect the copper in time, you will be rewarded with 15 Coins.
mcp.fort_suits_cutscene.16: %1$sSet the lava pump to where the arrows show. If you get the height set within 1 block, the %2$s will give you 10 Coins for helping out.
mcp.fort_suits_cutscene.17: %1$sHelp the %2$s take care of the haunted graveyard. You will receive an axe and must kill 4 skeletons that pop out of their graves while avoiding getting shot. If you can kill all the skeletons without getting shot thrice, the %3$s will award you with 10 Coins.
mcp.fort_suits_cutscene.18: %1$sLanding on a magenta space will swap two random quadrants' locations with each other.
mcp.fort_suits_cutscene.19: %1$s%2$s and %3$s> This board features two board specific items that give players the ability to move quadrant locations.
mcp.fort_suits_cutscene.20: %1$sThe board specific bonus star for this board is awarded to the player/team that alternates between red and black quadrants the highest number of times when traversing the board.

mcp.fort_suits_enter_diamonds.1: Snuck into Diamond Quadrant without paying: %1$s%2$s%3$s for %4$s
mcp.fort_suits_enter_diamonds.2: %1$s%2$sThank you for paying your dues to the Queen. %3$s%4$s
mcp.fort_suits_enter_diamonds.4: %1$s%2$sThank you for paying your - wait a sec. You cannot afford the fee of %3$s. I'll just take what you have and your turn ends here.
mcp.fort_suits_enter_diamonds.5: Failed to pay dues to Diamond Quadrant: %1$s%2$s%3$s for %4$s
mcp.fort_suits_event_setup.1: %1$s%2$s I've fallen and can't get up! Help set the pump meter to the correct height (indicated by the yellow arrows). Pull the lever to lower the platform then pull the lever again when it reaches the proper height. If you get the height within 1/2 of a block, I will give you %3$s from my pocket.
mcp.fort_suits_event_setup.2: %1$s%2$s Skeletons have haunted the graveyard! I'm old and weary but you can use this axe to kill the undead from their graves. If you do so without dying, I will reward you with %3$s%4$s
mcp.fort_suits_event_setup.3: %1$s%2$s Got items? In need of more? My service offers you the ability to enhance or duplicate an item at low costs but I limit one use per turn.
mcp.fort_suits_event_setup.6:
%1$s%2$s The queen has hidden a copper ingot in the pile of jewels. Any noble servant who finds it within 15 seconds gets awarded with %3$s. Care to take on the challenge?
Use %4$s on me to start the challenge.
 Use %5$s on the copper ingot to collect it.
mcp.fort_suits_event_setup.7: %1$s%2$s Hello! My fountain here has magical powers. If you've been good, you may sacrifice some of your Positive Karma %3$s into the well and you can get awarded with items!
mcp.fort_suits_event_setup.8: Ooooo... Come pay us a visit and cleanse yourself of your Negative Karma (%1$s) and you can choose any item you like by clicking it from the magical spirit book.

mcp.fort_suits_graveyard_tick.2: %1$s fended off the skeletons and won %2$s%3$s
mcp.fort_suits_judgement.2: %1$s%2$sSlow down there pal, it's judgement time. Let's see how good you've been...
mcp.fort_suits_judgement.3: %1$s%2$sYou're in deep trouble. Pray for my mercy...
mcp.fort_suits_judgement.4: %1$s%2$sYou've been a not-so-good player. Here comes your punishment...
mcp.fort_suits_judgement.5: %1$s%2$sYou've been a mild grievance. Time to make your restribution...
mcp.fort_suits_judgement.6: %1$s%2$sYou have not been very good nor very bad. Move along now...
mcp.fort_suits_judgement.7: %1$s%2$sYou've been a small asset to this land. Time for your small reward...
mcp.fort_suits_judgement.8: %1$s%2$sYou've been a role model for us all. Here is your prize...
mcp.fort_suits_judgement.9: %1$s%2$sYou're an angel! Here is something extra special for you...
mcp.fort_suits_judgement.29.3.hover: Any foe that crosses this trap gets zapped and gives 2 coins to the trap setter for every spot they pass until the end of their turn. This is a single use trap.
mcp.fort_suits_judgement.44: %1$s%2$s I set your current roll to 1!

mcp.freeze_trap_description.1:
%1$s%2$s%3$s
Can be received from %4$s spaces and from free item pickups.
mcp.gametheory3.1: Your player color indicates how many points get handed out with each decision combination.
mcp.gametheory4.1: The player with the most points at the end wins!
mcp.game_theory.1: Make decisions to earn more points than all of the other players.
mcp.game_theory.2: Make decisions to earn your team more points than %1$s
mcp.game_theory_rules.1: The final handout for points will be determined by what choices both players make.
mcp.game_theory_rules.2: Your player color indicates how many points get handed out with each decision combination.
mcp.game_theory_rules.3: There will be six rounds, and each player on the team of three will face %1$s twice.
mcp.game_theory_rules.4: The payouts for the players on the team of three will be greater than the lone player generally.
mcp.game_theory_rules.5: Whichever team that has the player with the most points will win! In the event of a tie for the highest points, %1$s will win.
mcp.ghast_blast.1: %1$s will shoot fireballs at %2$s by dropping or right-clicking their fireball item.
mcp.ghast_blast_rules.1: Fireballs deal high damage and destroy the map. Non-deflected ghast fireballs will disappear if shot to close to another ghast.
mcp.ghast_blast_rules.2: Ghasts can move down by crouching and move up by uncrouching.
mcp.ghast_blast_rules.3: %1$s can deflect the fireballs by left clicking them as they get close. The fireballs will go where you are looking.
mcp.ghast_blast_rules.4: %1$s can also hit ghasts with their sword if they get too close.
mcp.ghast_blast_rules.5: The ghasts win if they kill %1$s and %2$s wins by outlasting the ghasts.
mcp.ghost_hunt.1: %1$s will play as the ghosts and %2$s will play as the hunter.
mcp.ghost_hunt_rules.1: %1$s are invisible and emit faint white particles but can still see each other.
mcp.ghost_hunt_rules.2: The ghosts' goal is to haunt the villagers by hitting them until they get converted. Villagers turn into zombies when converted.
mcp.ghost_hunt_rules.3: The hunter has a sword with a short cooldown, but is able to hit villagers on accident.
mcp.ghost_hunt_rules.4: %1$s must defend the village by killing all the ghosts before all the villagers get haunted.
mcp.ghost_hunt_tick.2: The sun is now rising. Ghost will now die from the sun.
mcp.ghost_mode.2: Tip> You can crouch over the covered manhole to go through it.
mcp.ghost_mode_description.1:
%1$s%2$s%3$s Can be received from free item pickups or bought from the shop.
Cost: %4$s
mcp.ghoul_mode_description.1:
%1$s%2$s%3$s Can be received from free item pickups or bought from the shop.
Cost: %4$s
mcp.give_items.21: %1$s If you roll a 0, you can use your %2$s as long as you don't move.
mcp.give_items.22: %1$s If you roll a 0, you can use your %2$s as long as you don't move.
mcp.give_items.23: %1$s If you roll a 0, you can use your %2$s%3$s as long as you don't move.
mcp.give_random_item.65: %1$s could not give an item to %2$s!
mcp.weapon_devolution.1_old: Fight other players in one massive brawl!
mcp.weapon_devolution.2_old: Feel free to build your own gladiators arena if you want it to look different from this one ;)
mcp.weapon_devolution3.1_old: Placement is determined by order eliminated.
mcp.gold_bar_description.1:
%1$s%2$s%3$s Can be received from free item pickups or bought from the shop.
Cost: %4$s
mcp.gold_rush.1: Gold will fall down from the moving conveyor belts.
mcp.gold_rush.2: This is a weird game isn't it?
mcp.gold_rush2.1: Pick up gold nuggets and gold ingots to earn points.
mcp.gold_rush3.1: To pick up an item, crouch directly above it.
mcp.gold_rush4.1:
The point values are as follows:
Gold Nugget: 1 Point
Gold Ingot: 3 Points
Mine Gold Block: 6 Points
Mine Gold Ore: 2 Points
mcp.gold_rush5.1: You can pick up boots that give you a speed or jump effect by equipping them.
mcp.gold_rush6.1: You can jump to a higher belt with the jump effect.
mcp.gold_rush7.1: Beware of slime traps that slow you down. You can also use a pickaxe to mine the gold blocks.
mcp.gold_rush8.1: Collect the most gold points to win the game!
mcp.gold_rush_rules.1: Pick up gold nuggets and gold ingots by crouching on top of them to earn points.
mcp.gold_rush_rules.2:
The point values are as follows:
Gold Nugget: 1 Point
Gold Ingot: 3 Points
Mine Gold Block: 6 Points
Mine Gilded Blackstone: 2 Points
mcp.gold_rush_rules.3: You can pick up diamond boots that give you a speed effect by equipping them.
mcp.gold_rush_rules.4: You can pick up boots that give effects by equipping them. Diamond = Speed. Netherite = Jump Boost.
mcp.gold_rush_rules.5: %1$s can jump to a higher belts while the team of three cannot.

mcp.grand_prix_rules.1: This gamemode is constant minigames back-to-back encompassing all minigame types.
mcp.grand_prix_rules.2: Players will play %1$s rounds of minigames; each round consisting in order of: a 4 for all minigame, a 2v2 minigame, a 1v3 minigame, a duel, and a modified 4 for all minigame.
mcp.grand_prix_rules.3: Players will play %1$s rounds of minigames; each round consisting in order of: a Free for all minigame, a 3v3 minigame, a 1v3 minigame, a duel, and a modified Free for all minigame.
mcp.grand_prix_rules.4: Players will play %1$s rounds of minigames; each round consisting in order of: a Free for all minigame, a 4v4 minigame, a 2v6 minigame, a duel, and a modified Free for all minigame.
mcp.grand_prix_rules.5: Players will play %1$s rounds of minigames; each round consisting in order of: a Free for all minigame, a 5v5 minigame, a 2v6 minigame, a duel, and a modified Free for all minigame.
mcp.grand_prix_rules.6: The team arrangements will be randomized, but every combination of teams for each minigame type will occur.
mcp.grand_prix_rules.7: The team arrangements will be semi-randomized depending on their game type.
mcp.grand_prix_rules.8: You will earn coins for winning minigames.
mcp.grand_prix_rules.9: Modified Free For All minigames change the coin distribution for that game.
mcp.grand_prix_rules.10: Duel wagers will always be 10 coins. Players can have negative coins if they lose a duel early on.
mcp.grand_prix_rules.11: In total, %1$s minigames will be played. Final placements will be determined by whoever has the most coins at the end!
mcp.grand_prix_rules.12: Whenever everyone is ready, they can drop their ready-up item to start the first minigame.

mcp.lofty_luncheon_description.1:
%1$sThis board takes place on a dining room table with some hungry diners.

%2$s%3$s can be earned by either buying one from the %4$s for 20 %5$s or by bringing food/drinks to any diners requesting them.

%6$s The magenta space on this board replenishes a missing food or drink item on the board.

%7$sThere are two challenges on the board that you can attempt which each reward 15 %8$s%9$s%10$sThe bonus star for this board is the %11$s. It is awarded to the player that activates the most Duels, Micro Duels and Battle Minigames.

mcp.lost_city_cutscene.1:
Would you like to get an overview of the board?
%1$s %2$s
mcp.lost_city_cutscene.2: %1$sLost City's board gimmicks are determined by its day and night cycle. The day and night cycle goes for 6 turns (3 turns of daytime followed by 3 turns of nighttime) and repeats when done.
mcp.lost_city_cutscene.3: %1$sThe %2$s is positioned on top of the temple and stays there the entire game. When a player approaches the %3$s, they can buy up to 3 %4$s at a time. During the daytime, %5$s cost 20 %6$s each but during the nighttime, %7$s can cost 5, 10, 15, 30 or 40 %8$s. This value is randomly determined at the beginning of the first nighttime turn in the cycle.
mcp.lost_city_cutscene.4: %1$sPassing the key shop gives you an opportunity to acquire more currency. During the daytime, Rick runs the shop and will sell you a key for 5 %2$s which can open a chest that will have 0-25 %3$s in it. Nick takes over the night shift. For the cost of 60%% of the current %4$s price, he will sell you a key to a barrel that has a 50%% chance of containing a %5$s. The keys restock at the beginning of the next cycle after running out. Rick and Nick sell 6 keys each before running out.
mcp.lost_city_cutscene.5: %1$sPassing %2$s's magic hut will grant you an oppurtunity to duplicate a %3$s. Select a box out of 3 choices (6 during the nighttime phase) to deposit your %4$s into and %5$s will swirl the boxes around in the air. If you can correctly track down your box, you will be rewarded with an extra %6$s (2 during the nighttime phase). If you fail, you lose your %7$s.
mcp.lost_city_cutscene.6: You cannot use %1$s in this challenge.
mcp.lost_city_cutscene.7: %1$sDo you have what it takes to defeat the Elder Guardian Boss? Enter his cave to initiate the fight. Defeating him will reward you with 20 %2$s. Every time the boss is defeated, he will get stronger and reward more %3$s on the next kill. When killed, the Elder Guardian will need 1 turn to respawn and cannot be fought during this time.
mcp.lost_city_cutscene.8: %1$sVisiting Bew lets you steal 5-10 %2$s (for free) or steal a %3$s (for the cost of double the current %4$s price) from another player of your choice.
mcp.lost_city_cutscene.9: %1$sLanding on a magenta space will open up any blocked path next to it. If the path is already open, the event will close the path.
mcp.lost_city_cutscene.10: %1$sThe %2$s for this board is awarded to the player that uses the most items.
mcp.lost_city_description.1: %1$sThe star seller is at the center of the board and does not move. You can buy up to three stars at a time. The game follows a 6 turn day/night cycle. The star costs 20 coins during the day and can vary at night. The board specific star goes to the player that uses the most items in a game.

mcp.mooshroom_grotto_cauldron_task.1: %1$s Excellent! I need some materials. I will tell you what to look for. Make sure to put them in order too AND in the cauldron, or the potion will fail to be brewed! Do not drop any items on the floor or step into the cauldron. Click on me to start the challenge.
mcp.mooshroom_grotto_cauldron_task_end.1: %1$s Bah! You ruined it! Now I have to redo this whole thing! Get out! Scram!
mcp.mooshroom_grotto_cauldron_task_end.2: %1$s Congrats! I wasn't that trustworthy of outsiders before, but I'm glad you've proven that they are indeed capable. Here's 15 coins deary.

I'll use my magic once you step fully into the cave to turn all the cobblestone in there to ores for 15 seconds. Hold onto your lantern (in your offhand) to see but you can only see a few blocks in front of you. Good luck!

mcp.mooshroom_grotto_cutscene.1:
Would you like to get an overview of the board?
%1$s %2$s
mcp.mooshroom_grotto_cutscene.2: %1$sMooshroom Grotto is a large board with many elevation changes. This board offers opportunities to earn %2$s through a number of challenges.
mcp.mooshroom_grotto_cutscene.3: %1$sThe %2$s on this board sells 1 %3$s for the cost of 20 %4$s. The star seller moves after a star gets bought.
mcp.mooshroom_grotto_cutscene.4: %1$sThis villager has been turned into a Mooshroom. Help him collect three spider eyes to revert him back to normal. You will be rewarded with 10 %2$s for doing so.
mcp.mooshroom_grotto_cutscene.5: %1$sHelp the miner acquire the ores he needs and you will be rewarded with 10 %2$s.
mcp.mooshroom_grotto_cutscene.6: %1$sHelp the Witch get the materials she needs to make a potion and she will reward you with 15 %2$s.
mcp.mooshroom_grotto_cutscene.7:
%1$sVisiting the beacon on the bottom level of the board grants you the opportunity to use one of the four Safricial Altars. A sacrificial altar gives you random items and currencies when you sacrifice %2$s into it. The more %3$s you sacrifice, the better your reward. Generally, using a Sacrificial Altar is more cost effective than using the shops. There are four different altar types: Benefits, Attack, Star and Variety. Each offers a different set of obtainable items.

When an altar gets used, it loses 15%% of its sacrificial power and all the other altars gain 5%% sacrificial power.
mcp.mooshroom_grotto_cutscene.8: %1$sThe %2$s for this board is awarded to the player that sacrifices the most cumulative %3$s in the Sacrificial Altars.
mcp.mooshroom_grotto_cutscene.9: %1$sVisit this villager's hut to play the Posion Mushroom Challenge. You are given two mushrooms and you must correctly guess which one is poisonous. If you guess correctly, you will be rewarded with an Enchantment Shard which can be dropped into any Sacrificial Altar to boost your sacrificial power by 40%%.
mcp.mooshroom_grotto_cutscene.10: %1$sAny magenta space that you land on will break away beneath your feet and send you on a swim down a waterfall. Your pawn will end up on the lower level where the waterfall ends.
mcp.mooshroom_grotto_description.1: %1$sIn the center of the board, there are four different altars that you can sacrifice your coins into to get items. The items are random but also depend on which altar you drop your coins into. There are three tasks around the board that can be attempted that award 15 coins if completed. The board specific star is awarded to whoever sacrifices the most coins into the altars.
mcp.mooshroom_grotto_pass_spot.1: %1$s Hey! I need help! Wait you can understand me? Oh thank heavens. Look the Witch put a curse on me and turned me into this Moohshroom. I need you to go into my basement to grab 3 spider eyes. If you help, I can get you something special.
mcp.mooshroom_grotto_pass_spot.2: %1$s Well hello there outsider. I need some help. You see, one of your fellow surface dwellers caused my inventory to be scrambled about. I'm backed up on potion demands and I require assistance in making a new potion I need to perfect. The ingredients need to be precise! Think you're up to this task?
mcp.mooshroom_grotto_pass_spot.3: %1$s Hey can you help me? I'm looking for some materials and the only way I can get them is in this dark cave. We have a bunch of copper, gold, and iron in the mines, but this magical cave helps me find items for my own magical creations.
mcp.mooshroom_grotto_pass_spot.4: %1$s How did a surface dweller get down here? Doesn't matter. Come inside my mushroom hut. I've got something special for visitors!
mcp.mooshroom_grotto_pass_spot.5: %1$s I need help creating a mushroom stew meal. One of these mushrooms is poisonous and I can't tell which one it is. If you drop the non-poisonous mushroom into the cauldron, I will award you with a sacrificial enchantment shard.
mcp.mooshroom_grotto_pass_spot.6: %1$s Greetings surface dweller. I can provide you with any items you may seek.
mcp.mooshroom_grotto_poison_mushroom_end: %1$s You poisoned me! Now I'm gonna be sick.
%1$s You dropped the non-poisoned mushroom on the floor. Now it's ruined!
%1$s Nice job! You guessed correctly. Here is the sacrificial enchantment shard.
mcp.mooshroom_grotto_spider_challenge_en: %1$s Thank you %2$s. Here are 10 coins for your troubles. There are plenty more of us cursed mooshrooms to save.

mcp.pac_maze_cutscene.1:
Would you like to get an overview of the board?
%1$s %2$s
mcp.pac_maze_cutscene.2: %1$sPac Maze is a big board with lots of twists and turns themed after the popular arcade game Pac-Man.
mcp.pac_maze_cutscene.3: %1$sThis board has two %2$s active at all times with each of them selling a %3$s for 20 %4$s. A %5$s will move after a %6$s gets bought from it.
mcp.pac_maze_cutscene.4: %1$sThe %2$s for this board is awarded to the player that collects the most Pellets on the board. A Pellet is collected by passing over the space around it. Pellets can only be collected once and do not respawn.
mcp.pac_maze_cutscene.5: %1$sThe %2$s for this board is awarded to the player that collects the most Pac-Dots on the board. A Pac-Dot is collected by passing over the space around it. Pac-Dots can only be collected once and do not respawn.
mcp.pac_maze_cutscene.6: %1$sPower Pellets activate a passive ability on the player that collects it. Any enemy player that this player passes on the board during their turn will steal 8 %2$s from the enemy player and send them back to the start. After being collected, a Power Pellet stays active for the rest of that player's turn and three more additional whole turns. Once the ability expires, the Power Pellet will respawn allowing for other players to collect it.
mcp.pac_maze_cutscene.7: %1$sThere are 8 warps on this board that you can take which will teleport you to another warp on the board. When entering a warp, you have the option to teleport to the linked warp across from it (costs 5 %2$s), teleport to a random warp (costs 5 %3$s), or teleport to a warp of your choice (costs 10 %4$s).
mcp.pac_maze_cutscene.8: %1$sLanding on a magenta space will toggle the opened/closed state of the blocked off path right next to it.
mcp.pac_maze_description.1: %1$sIn this board, there are two star sellers. The path is marked by arrow blocks. When you approach a warp, you have the option to go to the linked warp (across), choose your warp, or warp randomly. The bonus star can be won by collecting the most pellets across the board. Pellets do not respawn. Power pellets (ender eyes) allow you to steal others' coins and send them back to the start if you pass them for two turns after being activated.

mcp.pipe_canyon_cutscene.1:
Would you like to get an overview of the board?
%1$s %2$s
mcp.pipe_canyon_cutscene.2: %1$sPipe Canyon is Minecraft Party 2's Mario-Themed board. This board is all about using pipes to warp to different places throughout the board.
mcp.pipe_canyon_cutscene.3: %1$sThe %2$s on this board sells 1 %3$s for the cost of 20 %4$s. The star seller moves after a star gets bought.
mcp.pipe_canyon_cutscene.4: %1$sVisit %2$s's Mushroom Hut for a chance to complete the Warp Maze Challenge. Winning this challenge earns you 10 %3$s.
mcp.pipe_canyon_cutscene.5: %1$sVisit Bowser's ship and defuse the active bomb. A successful defusal will reward you with 10 %2$s. Failing to defuse the bomb will blow you up and you will lose 10 %3$s.
mcp.pipe_canyon_cutscene.6: %1$sVisit %2$s to test your skills on the Paint Cube Challenge! Match the block palette on the floor beneath the glass in this challenge before the time runs out and you will be rewarded with 10 %3$s.
mcp.pipe_canyon_cutscene.7.3: . Walking through a warp will teleport you to the corresponding warp of the same color.
mcp.pipe_canyon_cutscene.7: %1$sIf you pass by a warp during your turn, you can take it for the cost of 7 %2$s%3$s%4$s and %5$s let you enter the warps without paying.
mcp.pipe_canyon_cutscene.8: %1$sLanding on a magenta space will warp you to the other magenta space on the board that has the same type of wooden slab border around the space. There are two pairs of magenta spaces on the board. One pair with an acacia slab border and the other pair with a warped slab border.
mcp.pipe_canyon_cutscene.9: %1$s%2$s%3$s for this board is awarded to the player that travels through the most warps. These include the colored pipes that can be taken as well as magenta space warps.
mcp.pipe_canyon_defuse_end.1: %1$s did not defuse the correct bomb.%2$s
mcp.pipe_canyon_description.1: %1$s Warps! Warps! Warps! You have the ability to traverse through warps around the board which will teleport you to the corresponding pipe of the same color. Magenta spaces will move you to the other magenta space with the same surrounding colored slabs. The board specific star is the warper star. Any warp tolls or magenta space warps (but not the Bew warp) will count towards this bonus star. In addition to warping, this board has a Bew portal in the middle and a few challenges around where you can earn coins.

mcp.port_priority.1: Each player will be given a key and be prompted with a random item to scavenge for.
mcp.port_priority.2: The item will be contained in a chest at one of the seven beacons.
mcp.port_priority.3: The key given will only be able to open that chest.
mcp.port_priority.4: Upon finding the item, the player will be given a new key and prompted for a new item to look for.
mcp.port_priority.5: All players will be tasked with finding the same three items, but the order will vary for each player.
mcp.port_priority.6: The player that finds all three items first wins.
mcp.port_priority.7: Chests are marked with item frames that show the item contained.
mcp.port_priority.8: Use this information to remember the item corresponding to any previous beacons that you have visited.
mcp.port_town_approach_bew.1: %1$s Come visit me ship, hop in the portal to yur right and plunder from one of yur mateys!
mcp.port_town_approach_captain_jones.1: %1$s Ahoy %2$s! Can you help me out with a quick task on me vessel?
mcp.port_town_approach_captain_jones.2: %1$s Me treasure has been possessed and is flying amuk! Sailor, I'll give you 20 %2$s if you can shoot it down with a trident and plunder me loot back.
mcp.port_town_approach_lighthouse.1: %1$s Come meet me at the top of the lighthouse. You won't regret it.
mcp.port_town_board_description.1: %1$sPort Town is all about plunder! Visit Bew's portal on his ship to steal 10 Coins (for free) or steal a Star (costs 40 Coins) from another player. Help Captain Jones recover his loot for a lucrative reward. Shoot TNT at other players from the cannon on top of the lighthouse. Yellow spaces have a 10%% chance of sending you to the lucky path where you can collect a free star.
mcp.port_town_board_description.2: %1$sThis bonus star for this board gets awarded to the player that steals the most Coins. Any Coins stolen through Pickpocketer, Coin Snatcher, Lightning/Anvil traps, lighthouse cannon, and Bew count towards this bonus star.
mcp.port_town_cannon_setup.1: %1$s Do you see the cannon on top of this lighthouse? You can use it to launch TNT at your mateys and steal their coins. Select any spot on the board by looking at it (highlighted in white) and then drop the TNT to shoot the cannon . The closer the TNT hits, the more coins it will steal!

mcp.port_town_cutscene.3: %1$sThe %2$s on this board sells 1 %3$s for the cost of 20 %4$s. The star seller moves after a star gets bought.
mcp.port_town_cutscene.4: %1$s When visiting Bew's ship, you can steal 10 %2$s from another player of your choice or steal a %3$s for the cost of 40 %4$s. Landing on the magenta space by%5$swill block visitors from his ship for two turns but can be bypassed using %6$s/%7$s.
mcp.port_town_cutscene.5: %1$sWhen passing the lighthouse, you can pick a spot on the board to fire an explosive. The explosive steals %2$s from nearby foes. The closer the pawn is, the more%3$swill be stolen.
mcp.port_town_cutscene.6: %1$sVisit Captain Jones's ship and help him retrive his treasure and he will reward you with 20 %2$s.
mcp.port_town_cutscene.7: %1$sLanding on a magenta space nearby the whirlpool will suck the player inside of the whirlpool and then teleport them to a random space on the board.
mcp.port_town_cutscene.8: %1$sAll%2$sspaces have a small chance to send you to the start of the lucky path. Reaching the end of the Lucky Path will reward you with a free%3$sand return you back to your previous location.
mcp.port_town_cutscene.9: %1$sThe %2$s for this board is awarded to the player that steals the most %3$s. Any %4$s stolen through Bew, the Lighthouse Cannon, or any item that transfers Coins from one player to another will count towards this %5$s.

mcp.pp_cutscene.1:
Would you like to get an overview of the board?
%1$s %2$s
mcp.pp_cutscene.2: %1$sPresent Palace is a festive Christmas themed board.
mcp.pp_cutscene.3: %1$sThe %2$s on this board sells 1 %3$s for the cost of 30 %4$s. The star seller moves after a star gets bought.
mcp.pp_cutscene.4: %1$s%2$s can be spawned on the map by landing on %3$s and are collected by passing them on the board. They can also be collected by winning challenges.
mcp.pp_cutscene.5: %1$sYou can deliver %2$s to any of the two wooden shacks (on the west and east side) on the board. For each present you deliver, you will receive 4 Coins. You do not have to return every present that you are holding when passing the shack.
mcp.pp_cutscene.6: %1$sThe %2$s for this board is awarded to the player that delivers the most presents.
mcp.pp_cutscene.7: %1$sLanding on a magenta space will spawn 3-5 presents on the board, each in a random vacant spot.
mcp.pp_cutscene.8: %1$sSwim through the pit of snow and find a lost pile of %2$s before getting frost bite.
mcp.pp_cutscene.9: %1$sDrop down the pit and land in the water to earn %2$s.
mcp.pp_cutscene.10: %1$sThe Grinch has stolen some %2$s from the barrels that the dripstone breaks.
mcp.pp_cutscene.11: %1$sAll%2$sspaces have a small chance to send you to the start of the lucky path. Reaching the end of the Lucky Path will reward you with a free%3$sand return you back to your previous location.
mcp.pp_deliver_tick.1: %1$s Hello. If you have any presents to deliver, come this way
mcp.pp_deliver_tick.2: %1$s Hello. If you have any presents to deliver, come this way
mcp.pp_deliver_tick.3: Right click any %1$s to deliver 1 present
mcp.pp_ice_plunge_tick.1: %1$s I have a dare for you. Jump into the water below. I will give you one present plus one additional present per ice block that you land next to. If you miss the water, you lose and get nothing.
mcp.pp_ice_plunge_tick.2: %1$s won %2$s%3$s%4$s from the ice plunge challenge.
mcp.pp_ice_plunge_tick.3: %1$s won %2$s%3$s%4$s from the ice plunge challenge.
mcp.pp_pass_spot.1: %1$sWhoa there! You left the door open. It gets cold when you do that. One more crack like that and you may end up on the naughty list!
mcp.pp_pass_spot.2: %1$sWhoa there! You left the door open. It gets cold when you do that. One more crack like that and you may end up on the naughty list!
