mcp.pp_snow_tick.1: %1$s There are some coins buried in this pile of snow. Grab the coins to win them. Do not spend too much time in the snow or you will get frost bite (indicated in actionbar). Here are some leather boots to help you out. Crouch to go into the snow.
mcp.pp_snow_tick.2: %1$s won %2$s%3$s from the snow pit challenge.
mcp.pp_snow_tick.3: %1$s froze from the snow pit challenge.
mcp.pp_stage1.1: One player presses buttons on the right side to set a bridge of that corresponding color on the opposite side
mcp.pp_stage2.1: Take turns pressing the buttons to set temporary blocks for your partner to jump on.
mcp.pp_stage3.1: You will get three colors of wool in your chest and your partner has three different colors. Copy your own build on your own side.
mcp.pp_stage4.1: One door leads to the exit. The others bring you back to this room. Figure out together which button sets you free!
mcp.pp_stage5.1: Press your buttons quickly. You must alternate presses. Keep alternate pressing until the meter reaches the top and you hear a ding sound. If you are too slow, the meter goes down.
mcp.pp_stage6.1: Climb up the waterfall dam on opposite sides to finish!
mcp.present_palace_description.1:
%1$s%2$s%3$s> This holiday themed board has a few special gimmicks.

%4$s: Presents can be picked up across the map and collected from challenges. Presents can be delivered at any of the wooden shacks for 4 coins each.%5$s%6$s can be earned by buying one from the %7$s for 30 %8$s.

%9$s The magenta space on this board spawns 3-5 presents randomly across the map.

%10$sThere are three challenges on this board. The ice plunge and the Grinch's cave challenge awards %11$s and the snow pit challenge awards %12$s%13$s%14$sThe bonus star for this board is the %15$s. It is awarded to the player that delivers the most presents to the wooden shacks.

mcp.prison_pals.2: Cooperate with your partners to escape the prison.
mcp.prison_pals_rules.1: Complete different challenges as a team.
mcp.prison_pals_rules.2: Step over chiseled stone bricks to set spawn.
mcp.prison_pals_rules.3: First team to complete the five stages wins!
mcp.pusher.2: %1$s must avoid getting pushed into the water.

mcp.pusher_rules.2: The buttons push out the corresponding block on the wall when pressed.
mcp.pusher_rules.3: If a player if right in front of that spot that pushed them off, they will fall down into the water.
mcp.pusher_rules.4: %1$s must push all players off the platform before the time ends!
mcp.pusher_rules.5: %1$s must have at least one player left after 60 seconds of play!

mcp.quick_draw.1: You will start the game walking and facing away from your opponent.
mcp.quick_draw_rules.1: Once you reach the end of the field, some time will pass and you will receive a loaded crossbow.
mcp.quick_draw_rules.2: When you receive the crossbow, immediately turn around and fire your shot at your opponent.
mcp.quick_draw_rules.3: Arrows are instant kills. Players will receive another loaded crossbow three seconds after each shot.
mcp.quick_draw_rules.4: Hit your opponent without getting hit yourself to win!
mcp.quick_play_1v3.1: There must be at least 3 players online and queued as player to play this minigame.
mcp.rainbow_run.2: Wind charges will spawn from the dark gray cloud and will fly towards the rainbow that you are on.
mcp.rainbow_run.3: Colliding with a wind charge will damage you and send you flying up in the air.
mcp.rainbow_run.4: The last player to survive wins!
mcp.rainbow_run.5: The wind charge spawn rate will increase as the minigame goes on.
mcp.rainbow_run.6: Beware! Fall damage is on, natural regenerate is off, and you will die instantly if you fall off the rainbow.

mcp.ravager_rodeo.2: %1$s and %2$s have %4$s seconds to knock all of the %3$s's players out of the arena while riding on top of Ravagers.
mcp.ravager_rodeo.3: %1$s must eliminate players by colliding their ravager's head with the opposing players.
mcp.ravager_rodeo.4: %1$s and %2$s must eliminate players by colliding their ravager's head with the opposing players.
mcp.ravager_rodeo.5: %1$s gets a charge ability which dashes the Ravager in a straight line at a high speed in the direction the rider is facing. Any aqua team members in its path will get launched out of the arena.
mcp.ravager_rodeo.6: %1$s and %2$s get a charge ability which dashes their Ravager in a straight line at a high speed in the direction the rider is facing. Any aqua team members in its path will get launched out of the arena.
mcp.ravager_rodeo.7: The charge ability recharges 10 seconds after the previous use and can be used by hitting %1$s.
mcp.ravager_rodeo.8: At least one member on the %1$s must survive until the time runs out to grant their team the win.
mcp.ravager_rodeo.9: %1$sYour Ravager will move in the direction that you are looking.
mcp.reactor_reactor.2: A counter will start at 9 on the lamp display
mcp.reactor_reactor_rules.1: When it is your turn, you can lower the counter by 1 or by 2 by choosing a button.
mcp.reactor_reactor_rules.2: After you press a button, it then becomes your opponent's turn to press a button.
mcp.reactor_reactor_rules.3: After each player's first turn, the counter is not displayed.
mcp.reactor_reactor_rules.4: Whichever player reduces the counter to zero or below loses the game.
mcp.ready_up_tellraw.1: All players can drop their ready up item when they are ready to begin the game.
mcp.realmsmode_setting.1: This will prevent a couple minigames from being played that exist in a custom dimension. Realms has issues with loading custom dimensions. Additionally, this mode allows for all players to use operator items.
mcp.recover_item_attempt.50.2.hover: Select the next turn number. Choose any turn between Turn %1$s and Turn %2$s. Runs a special event after the current turn is over. Only one player can hold a Crazy Clock or Cuckoo Clock at a time.
mcp.recover_item_attempt.52.2.hover: %1$s%2$s Coins from every player that you pass and that passes you on the board. Expires after 3 turns.
mcp.recover_item_attempt.54.2.hover: Teleports you to the closest main star seller and gives you any Coins needed to buy a Star.
mcp.rhythmic_room_cutscene.1:
Would you like to get an overview of the board?
%1$s %2$s
mcp.rhythmic_room_cutscene.2: %1$sRhythmic Room is a music room themed board.
mcp.rhythmic_room_cutscene.3: %1$sThe %2$s on this board sells 1 %3$s for the cost of 20 %4$s. However, after a player buys a %3$s, the price changes randomly to either 0, 5, 10, 15, 20, 30, or 40 %4$s and the %2$s moves to a new location.
mcp.rhythmic_room_cutscene.4: %1$sLanding on one of the two magenta spaces with a metronome next to it will run the Metronome Event. This event will randomly change the price of a %2$s to either 0, 5, 10, 15, 20, 30 or 40 %3$s.
mcp.rhythmic_room_cutscene.5: %1$sLanding on one of the two magenta spaces on the piano will run an event that has a 50%% chance to give all players 5 %2$s to take 5 %3$s away from all players.
mcp.rhythmic_room_cutscene.6: %1$sLanding on one of the two magenta spaces on the drum will launch the lander to a random space on the board.
mcp.rhythmic_room_cutscene.7: %1$sLanding on one of the two magenta spaces with a horn next to it will launch the lander directly in front of the %2$s.
mcp.rhythmic_room_cutscene.8: %1$sLanding on the magenta space on the chair will launch the lander to a random player's spot.
mcp.rhythmic_room_cutscene.9: %1$sHelp %2$s tune his noteblock and he will reward you with 10 %3$s.
mcp.rhythmic_room_cutscene.10: %1$sTest your rolling skills on the snare drum! The faster you roll, the more %2$s you you will get.
mcp.rhythmic_room_cutscene.11: %1$sThe %2$s for this board is awarded to the player that lands on the most good/bad luck spaces. These include yellow spaces, black spaces and chance time.
mcp.ring_in_the_ring.1: Ring the bell as fast as you can!
mcp.ring_in_the_ring.2: Each ring adds one point to your ring score and subtracts one from your opponent's score!
mcp.ring_in_the_ring.3: The first player to 20 rings wins!
mcp.ring_in_the_ring.4: The winning threshold will go down slowly as the game goes on to prevent stalemates.
mcp.rlgl.1: The game is Red Light, Green Light.
mcp.rlgl_rules.1: When the light turns green, you may go forward.
mcp.rlgl_rules.2: You must stop immediately when the light turns red or else you get sent back to the start
mcp.rlgl_rules.3: The color of the light will be shown in the chat.
mcp.rlgl_rules.4: Be the first player to reach the end to win!
mcp.rocket_launch.1: You have elytra wings and one firework rocket.
mcp.rocket_launch_rules.1: You must jump off the platform in the indicated direction and use your rocket to boost yourself as far as possible.
mcp.rocket_launch_rules.2: Once you land on the ground, you are finished.
mcp.rocket_launch_rules.3: The player that travels the farthest wins!
mcp.rocket_launch_rules.4: The field ends at 2160 blocks. Any extra height gained at the finish will add on to your score with a tiebreaker being who landed first.
mcp.roll_off.2: Each player will roll a dice.
mcp.roll_off.3: The player that rolls the highest wins coins equivalent to their roll.
mcp.roll_off.4: %1$s will roll first, followed by the next player in the turn order.
mcp.roll_off_end.2: %1$s won the Roll Off and earned %2$s%3$s!

mcp.rpsc.4: Decide as a team whether to throw rock, paper, or scissors against the other team.
mcp.rpsc_rules.1: Rock beats scissors. Scissors beats paper. Paper beats rock.
mcp.rpsc_rules.2: After both teams decide, everyone gets moved up to the front line.
mcp.rpsc_rules.3: On the ding, the choices will be revealed as items on top of the chiseled stone brick.
mcp.rpsc_rules.4: If your choice beats the choice of the other team, then you may attack them.
mcp.rpsc_rules.5: If your choice loses to the other team's choice, then you should run back to your safety zone.
mcp.rpsc_rules.6: Your health will not regenerate between rounds.
mcp.rpsc_rules.7: First team to eliminate the other team wins!
mcp.rpsc_shoot.1: The choices are about to be revealed!
mcp.rpsc_start_round.1: Select an item to play by dropping it. One player drops for both.
mcp.rr_board_description.1.2: The star price on this board starts at 20 coins and can change to 0, 5, 10, 15, 20, 30, or 40 coins.
mcp.rr_board_description.1.3: The bonus star for this board is the luck star and is awarded to whoever lands on the most yellow, black, and chance time spaces.
mcp.rr_board_description.1:
%1$s%2$s
Magenta spaces do the following:
Piano: Gives or takes 5 coins from all players
Drum: Launches player to a random space
Chair: Launches player to a random player
Horn: Launches player to star space
Metronome: Changes star price. 
%3$s
mcp.rr_drum_challenge.1: %1$s I need a drummer who can drum fast. Let's see how fast you can drum. The faster you drum the more coins you will earn. Click me to learn about the challenge. Click the sign to start the challenge.
mcp.rr_drum_challenge_tick.1: %1$s Alternate right and left click to hit the drum. The more hits you can do, the more coins you will win.

mcp.rr_horn_event.1: %1$s got launched to the star space!

mcp.rr_pass_spot.5: %1$s Welcome! Welcome! I've got some items that may be of use to you!

mcp.rr_piano_event.2: All players have gained 5 coins each

mcp.rr_tuner_challenge_end.2: %1$s completed the note tuning challenge and won %2$s.

mcp.runner.2: A falling block will kill any player that it comes in contact with.
mcp.runner.3: The falling blocks will also destroy the ground beneath it.

mcp.slime_time.1: %1$s will play as slow slimes. %2$s will play as the runner.
mcp.slime_time.2: %1$s will play as slow slimes. %2$s will play as the runners.
mcp.slime_time_rules.1: %1$s each control a large slime beneath them by moving.
mcp.slime_time_rules.2: The runner must keep away from the slimes at all costs.
mcp.slime_time_rules.3: The runner may run over feathers for an instant speed boost or glass for temporary invisibility.
mcp.slime_time_rules.4:
The runners can get the following temporary effects:
Run Over Feather: Speed
Run Over Glass Invisibility
Drop Ender Eye/Right Click: Warp To Teammate
mcp.slime_time_rules.5: The game lasts 55 seconds. In order for the aqua team to win, one of their slimes must touch %1$s.

mcp.slime_time_rules.6: %1$s wins by avoiding all the slimes until the time runs out.
mcp.snow_wars.1: Throw snowballs at the opposing team.
mcp.snow_wars.2: Each snowball that hits a player will do damage.
mcp.snow_wars.3: You will receive a new snowball every 3 seconds (maximum of 6).
mcp.snow_wars.4: The team that eliminates the other wins!
mcp.solidify_fail.1: Cannot solidify into water as this block
mcp.solidify_fail.2: You can only solidify on top of a grass block as a piece of grass
mcp.solidify_fail.3: You can only solidify on top of a grass block as a dandelion
mcp.solidify_fail.4: You may only solidify into air.
mcp.solidify_fail.5: You cannot solidify on the edge of a block as gravel
mcp.solidify_fail.6: You can only solidify on the ground as a solid block.
mcp.space_description.1: %1$s +3 Coins for player that lands on it.%2$s
mcp.space_description.2: %1$s -3 Coins for player that lands on it.%2$s
mcp.space_description.3: %1$s Random fortunate outcome to player that lands on it. Such event could include: Gaining 7-10 coins, Opponents lose 6 coins, Receive Minion Pet, Receive Coin Snatcher, Receive Crazy Clock (rare item).%2$s
mcp.space_description.4: %1$s Random unfortunate outcome to player that lands on it. Such event could include: Losing 7-10 coins, Opponents gain 6 coins, Lose all your items, Lose your next turn.%2$s
mcp.space_description.5: %1$s Random neutral event for all players. Such event could include: Roll off, Coin minigame, Spawn single use star seller, Coin pile, Chump Charity, Stimulus, Double Trouble, Communism, Coin Shower. This space counts towards Event Star.%2$s
mcp.space_description.6: %1$s Player that lands on it receives a movement or trap item. Such items could include: Mini Dice, Twice Dice, Thrice Dice, Fire Trap, Anvil Trap, Ice Trap, Zap Trap, Honey Boost, Ender Trap (some boards).%2$s
mcp.space_description.7: %1$s Initiates a duel! The player that lands on the space must choose someone else to go against in a duel minigame where both players will bet coins or a star. The wager is chosen by the player that lands on the spot.%2$s
mcp.space_description.8: %1$s A board specific event occurs. Usually this will move player(s) positions or open/close a path. This space counts towards Event Star. Rarity of space varies between each board.
mcp.space_description.9: %1$s%2$s Initiates a battle minigame! All players will put in a certain number of coins (if they have them) into a pot. 1st place wins the majority of the pot and 2nd place wins their bid back. Coin distributions are adjusted in mega-party mode so that the top half of finishers will earn coins.%3$s
mcp.space_description.10: %1$s%2$s Initiates chance time! Chance time is an event that will involve a transaction between two players. The transaction can include giving or swapping of coins, items, or stars. This space counts towards Event Star.%3$s
mcp.space_jumpers.1: Each team will have a shooter and a jumper.
mcp.space_jumpers.2: Each team will have two shooters and a jumper.
mcp.space_jumpers.3: Each team will have two shooters, a griefer, and a jumper.
mcp.space_jumpers.4: Each team will have two shooters, a griefer, and two jumpers.
mcp.space_jumpers_rules.1: The shooters must hit the buttons on the end stone bricks to extend the block out.
mcp.space_jumpers_rules.2: The jumpers have jump boost 4 and can jump on any of the extended platforms.
mcp.space_jumpers_rules.3: The jumpers have jump boost 4 and can jump on any of the extended platforms. The griefers can shoot tridents on the front of the other team's platform blocks to get rid of them.
mcp.space_jumpers_rules.4: First team to have their jumper reach the end wins!

mcp.step_into_altar.1: Welcome to the sacrificial alter. Drop your coins into the lava cauldron to sacrifice them. When you're done, press the button and a reward will be given to you. The more coins you sacrifice, the higher the chances are of getting more and better items.
mcp.step_into_altar.2: Drop coins into the altar and press the button to sacrifice them to get some items!
mcp.stevesays2.1: You must do the action in chat only if Steve says so.
mcp.stevesays3.1: If you do an action that you are not supposed to, then you get kicked out of the game!
mcp.stevesays4.1: You earn 3 Points for completing each action on time, 4 Points for completing the action first and 0 Points for not completing the action at all.
mcp.stevesays5.1: The game ends after 22 actions. Earn the most points to win!
mcp.steve_says.1: Do exactly what Steve tells you to do.

mcp.suburbia_scramble_cutscene.1:
Would you like to get an overview of the board?
%1$s %2$s
mcp.suburbia_scramble_cutscene.2: %1$sSuburbia Scramble is all about investing in properties. %2$s do not spawn on this board.
mcp.suburbia_scramble_cutscene.3: %1$sPlayers' %2$s counts are based on the number of %3$s they have invested in each plot. The more %4$s a player has invested in a plot that they own, the more %5$s they will get from it.
mcp.suburbia_scramble_cutscene.4: %1$s Passing by a plot gives you an opportunity to invest in it. You can invest any amount of %2$s that you have into the plot. Use the "+1 %3$s" and "-1 %4$s" signs to add and subtract the amount that you would like invested. Click on the confirmation sign in the middle to confirm your investment.
mcp.suburbia_scramble_cutscene.5: %1$sWhenever any changes to a plot investment occurs, the text on top will update to show who owns it as well as the %2$s payouts for the plot.
mcp.suburbia_scramble_cutscene.6: Stars can also be given out to the 2nd place player in a plot if they have enough %1$s invested.
mcp.suburbia_scramble_cutscene.7: Stars can also be given out to the 2nd and 3rd place player in a plot if they have enough %1$s invested.
mcp.suburbia_scramble_cutscene.8: %1$sThe building on the plots will also update depending on the number of %2$s invested by the plot owner (the player with the most %3$s invested in the plot).
mcp.suburbia_scramble_cutscene.9: %1$sThis is the Tier 1 Building. It awards 1 %2$s to the plot owner.
mcp.suburbia_scramble_cutscene.10: %1$sThis is the Tier 2 Building. It awards 2 %2$s to the plot owner.
mcp.suburbia_scramble_cutscene.11: %1$sThis is the Tier 3 Building. It awards 3 %2$s to the plot owner.
mcp.suburbia_scramble_cutscene.12: %1$sThis is the Tier 4 Building. It awards 4 %2$s to the plot owner.
mcp.suburbia_scramble_cutscene.13: %1$sThis is the Plot 5 Building. It both looks and works differently from the other plots. It gives 3 %2$s (regardless of the amount of %3$s invested) to the plot owner. This plot can only be accessed by going through the manhole.
mcp.suburbia_scramble_cutscene.14: %1$sThis is the manhole. When the manhole is open, it will bring players to the path where Plot 5 is located. Players that reach the end of the path will take the manhole exit by the start of the board. The manhole's initial state is closed.
mcp.suburbia_scramble_cutscene.15: %1$sThe manhole opens when a player lands on the magenta space right before it and stays open for one turn. A player can also travel through the manhole in its closed state if the player has %2$s or %3$s activated.
mcp.suburbia_scramble_cutscene.16: %1$sLanding on a magenta space on a corner of the board automatically invests 10 %2$s in the nearest plot for the player that lands on the space.
mcp.suburbia_scramble_cutscene.17: %1$sVisit Pablo the Pincher's Humble Abode! You can choose an opponent and Pablo will steal from a random plot of theirs and deposit the investment into yours. If you have a spare item to offer that Pablo wants, Pablo will Pinch extra hard.
mcp.suburbia_scramble_cutscene.18: %1$sHelp Tyren organize his picnic basket and he will reward you with 10 %2$s.
mcp.suburbia_scramble_cutscene.19: %1$sThe %2$s for this board is awarded to the player that has the highest minimum %3$s invested across all plots.
mcp.suburbia_scramble_description.1:
%1$sStars are acquired by investing into plots. Whoever invests the most coins into a plot becomes the owner of that plot and earns stars depending on how many coins they have invested into the plot.
%2$sCoin: Tier 1 Plot
%3$s Coins: Tier 2 Plot
%4$s Coins: Tier 3 Plot
%5$s: Tier 4 Plot
Plot 5 can be visited by going through the manhole. Plot 5 always remains at tier 3.
%6$sManhole: Opens the manhole for one turn. Jumping in there leads to the part of the board with Plot 5.
Corner spaces: Automatically invests 10 %7$s (for free) in the nearest plot for the player that lands on the space.
%8$sThe Diversification Star is awarded to the player with the highest minimum number of %9$s invested across all plots.

mcp.szb.1: Similiar to rock, paper, scissors, you must pick either snowman, zombie or blaze against your opponent.
mcp.szb_rules.1: Zombie defeats Snowman. Snowman defeats Blaze. Blaze defeats Zombie.
mcp.szb_rules.2: Choose the correct option against your opponent to win. If both players choose the same mob, the game is replayed.
mcp.szb_tick.1: Drop the head of the mob that you want to choose.
mcp.take_flight.1: You have elytra wings. You must race through the course by flying and using your rockets.
mcp.take_flight_rules.1: There is a 1/2 second minimum cooldown between each rocket use.
mcp.take_flight_rules.2: Fly though yellow squares for a speed boost. If you die, you lose momentum and respawn where you are at.
mcp.take_flight_rules.3: The first player to complete three laps wins!
mcp.tanks.1: This is a battle among two teams! Shoot the other team to deal damage.
mcp.tanks_rules.1: %1$s will control the movement of a skeleton below while %2$s will control the shooting of their skeleton.
mcp.tanks_rules.2: Players can shoot arrows (1 second cooldown) by pressing %1$s or %2$s. Arrows will fly where the end rod is facing.
mcp.tanks_rules.3: Wither skeletons have more health and deal more damage than regular skeleton.
mcp.tanks_rules.4: First team to eliminate the other team wins!
mcp.team_hockey.1: Two turtles will spawn in the center of the rink.
mcp.team_hockey_rules.1: Punch the turtles into your opposing team's goal to score.
mcp.team_hockey_rules.2: Once one of the first two turtles gets scored, a new turtle will get spawned in the center.
mcp.team_hockey_rules.3: First team to score two goals wins!
mcp.tedious_tasks.1: Complete the 8 tasks as quickly as you can.
mcp.tedious_tasks.2: Tasks will be given (in chat) in a random order for all players.
mcp.tedious_tasks.3: You can kill/disrupt other players. Do whatever it takes!
mcp.tedious_tasks.4: Tip: Make sure you have your %1$s channel at an audible level for this game.
mcp.temple_end.1: %1$s beat the temple dungeon challenge and won%2$s
mcp.temple_end.2: %1$s beat the temple dungeon challenge with no scratches and won%2$s
mcp.temple_end.3: %1$s died while attempting the temple dungeon challenge.
mcp.temple_end.4: %1$s ran out of time while attempting the temple dungeon challenge.
mcp.temple_generate.1: %1$s Come journey through this ancient temple and you can win %2$s if you complete it. I will award you with an additional %3$s if you finish without losing any health.
mcp.tetris.1: Welcome to Betris, a game based off tetris.
mcp.tetris_rules.1: In this game, you will drop 2D pieces from the top into the gray container.
mcp.tetris_rules.2: The pieces will be made up of four blocks each.
mcp.tetris_rules.3: For each row of blocks you have anywhere that is filled completely with pieces, it gets removed and sent to your opponent.
mcp.tetris_rules.4: If you clear a row that was sent to you, it does not get sent back.
mcp.tetris_rules.5: You can also hold or swap your current piece by moving forward
mcp.tetris_rules.6: If any block of yours reaches the top, you lose.
mcp.tetris_rules.7:
Controls:
Drop Piece: %1$s
Soft Drop Piece: %2$s
Move Piece: Scroll Wheel
Rotate Piece Clockwise: %3$s or %4$s
Rotate Piece Counter Clockwise: %5$s or %6$s
Swap Pieces: %7$s
mcp.tetris_rules.8: Tip: Set your fingers on the control keys before the game starts and keep them there. First player to eliminate their opponent wins the duel!
mcp.tetris_tick.1: Starting now, every 10 seconds a permanent row will get added and the playing area will get smaller!

mcp.whack_a_mob_rules.1: You get points for hitting more monsters.
mcp.whack_a_mob_rules.2: Each monster requires a full hit from the axe to earn points.
mcp.whack_a_mob_rules.3: The point values for hitting each monster is as follows:
mcp.whack_a_mob_rules.4:
Zombies: 1 Point
Zombie with Armor: 3 Points
Wither Skeleton: 3 Points
Zombified Piglin: 2 Points
Enderman: 5 Points
Blaze: -1 Point
mcp.whack_a_mob_rules.5: Zombies with armor take two hits to kill. Wither skeletons last for shorter time. Enderman will disappear and reappear in the same position.

mcp.what_the_cluck.2: Each egg that hits an enemy chicken will do damage.
mcp.what_the_cluck.3: Eggs will get thrown from your chicken in the direction that you are looking but with 0 motion in the Y direction.
mcp.what_the_cluck.4: Eggs are immune to gravity and can bank shot off of walls once.
mcp.what_the_cluck.5: You will get a new egg in your inventory twice every second and you can hold up to 10 at a time.
mcp.what_the_cluck.6: Your chicken will follow your movement right beneath you.
mcp.what_the_cluck.7: The team that eliminates the other wins!

mcp.zen_garden_cutscene.1:
Would you like to get an overview of the board?
%1$s %2$s
mcp.zen_garden_cutscene.2: %1$sZen Garden is a large board with a few fun challenges on it that can be played to earn bonus %2$s. The path of the board requires players to turn at every intersection.
mcp.zen_garden_cutscene.3: %1$sThe %2$s on this board has multiple offers, which gives players the ability to buy up to 5 %3$s at a time. Players can choose to buy less %4$s at a time for less %5$s per %6$s, or buy in bulk at a large cost. The star seller moves after a star gets bought.
mcp.zen_garden_cutscene.4: %1$sThe %2$s for this board is awarded to the player that makes the most %3$s purchases.
mcp.zen_garden_cutscene.5: %1$sCan you get a skeleton to kill a 1 HP creeper? If so, the DJ will reward you 20 %2$s for bringing him a new music disc.
mcp.zen_garden_cutscene.6: %1$sComplete a full lap in the river using a riptide trident in under 30 seconds and Poseidon will reward you with 10 %2$s. Each time a player completes the challenge, the time limit decreases by 2 seconds and the reward increases by 5 %3$s.
mcp.zen_garden_cutscene.7: %1$sGuess the correct sequence of 3 blocks and you will be rewarded with 10 %2$s. After each incorrect guess, you will be given a hint based off your previous guess to help you get closer to the answer. After 5 incorrect guesses, you will fail the challenge.
mcp.zen_garden_cutscene.8: %1$sLanding on this magenta space will start a %2$s event. All players put %3$s into a pot during the daytime or will put one %4$s each into the pot during the nighttime. To be eligible, you must have at least 20 %5$s (daytime) or at least 1 %6$s (nighttime). Each participant will plant a bamboo and whichever player's bamboo grows the highest wins the majority of the pot while 2nd place earns their bid back. 3rd place and below will receive nothing.
mcp.zen_garden_description.1:
%1$s
You must turn at every intersection when traversing the board.
You can buy up to 5 Stars at a time from the main Star Seller. The more Stars you buy at once, the more expensive each one is.
There is a passable Music Disc Challenge that awards 20 coins if beat.
The Trident Race challenge awards you 10 coins if beat. This challenge gets harder and the reward increases each time a player beats it.
There is also a block guessing challenge which awards 15 Coins when beat.
The one magenta spot activates a coin shuffle in the beginning portion of the game and a star shuffle after a special event has been ran.
The custom board star is the Transaction Star and is awarded to the player/team that completes the most number of star transactions.
mcp.zen_garden_mastermind_check_guess.1: %1$s beat The Block Guessing Challenge and won 10 %2$s
mcp.zen_garden_mastermind_check_guess.2: %1$s did not beat The Block Guessing Challenge.
mcp.zen_garden_mastermind_rules.1:
%1$s You will be given 6 concrete blocks. Your goal is to guess the correct sequence of blocks by placing three of them on the white terracotta. After very failed guess, your guess will show up on the left side along with all your previous guesses. The right side tell you the number of blocks that are correct, in the wrong spot, not included in the solutions. You have 5 guesses to win. There is no time limit.%2$s if you can beat it!
Click on me to start the challenge.
mcp.zen_garden_pass_spot.1: %1$s I am trying to expand my music collection. If you can get a skeleton to kill a creeper and pick up the music disc without dying, falling off, or having the creeper explode, I will reward you with 15 coins. It costs nothing to attempt the challenge, so what are you waiting for? Click the sign ON THE STAGE to start the challenge.
mcp.zen_garden_pass_spot.2:
%1$s Good day matey, do you think you can beat the Trident Race challenge? Complete one lap in under %2$s seconds and I will reward you with %3$s%4$s!
Click on me to start the challenge.
mcp.zen_garden_pass_spot.3:
%1$s Welcome, I have a challenge for you! I will reward you with 15 %2$s if you can beat it!
Click on me to start the challenge.
mcp.zen_garden_pass_spot.4: %1$s Hello humanoid. Welcome to my humble abode. Care for any items?
mcp.zen_garden_trident_race_end.1: %1$s did not beat the Trident Race Challenge.
mcp.zen_garden_trident_race_end.2: %1$s beat the Trident Race Challenge and won %2$s%3$s!

mcp.BoardOverviewPrompt:
Would you like to get an overview of the board?
%1$s %2$s
mcp.crazy_carnival_cutscene.1: %1$s%2$s is a carnival themed board that will put your skills to the test in various carnival games.
mcp.crazy_carnival_cutscene.2: %1$sThis board features 7 different challenges that offer rewards when beaten.
mcp.crazy_carnival_cutscene.3: %1$sThere will always be 4 challenges open (able to be played) with 2 of them being %2$s challenges and the other 2 being %3$s challenges.
mcp.crazy_carnival_cutscene.4: %1$s%2$s challenges require the purchase of a %2$s from the villager standing by it for 20 %3$s and can be optionally attempted for the cost of 10 %3$s. Beating one of these challenges will reward you with an additional %2$s.
mcp.crazy_carnival_cutscene.5: %1$s%2$s challenges are free to attempt. Beating one of these challenges will reward you with 15 %3$s.
mcp.crazy_carnival_cutscene.6: %1$sA challenge will close immediately after a player attempts it regardless of success or failure and a new one will open.
mcp.crazy_carnival_cutscene.7: %1$sThis board also features a monorail system to help players traverse it.
mcp.crazy_carnival_cutscene.8: %1$sYou can trade 6 %2$s with the %3$s to advance 1 station clockwise or trade 12 %2$s to advance 2 stations clockwise. You cannot take multiple monorail trips between spaces.
mcp.crazy_carnival_cutscene.9: %1$sFor a fee, players can use the teacups to travel to the opposite side as the one they are entering. The teacups can be entered from either side. The toll for the teacups start at 1 %2$s. Players can pay any amount of money greater than or equal to the current toll amount. After each use, the new toll price will be 1 %2$s higher than the previous amount.
mcp.crazy_carnival_cutscene.10: %1$s> The board specific bonus star for this board is awarded to the player that lands on the most %2$s spaces.
mcp.board_explanation.28: %1$s board built by %3$s and developed by %4$s and %5$s.

mcp.welcome_rules_book.page_1.1: Welcome to Minecraft Party 2! This map is a 2-10 player game loosely based off Mario Party. It resembles a board game and features 16 boards (currently), 101 minigames, 32 pairs of items, and more! We hope you have fun and enjoy the map.
mcp.welcome_rules_book.page_2.2: Up to 10 players can play but an even number is recommended. Each player rolls the die when it is their turn and moves the corresponding number of spaces. After everyone has taken a turn, a minigame will activate and the
mcp.welcome_rules_book.page_3.1: winners will earn coins. The main objective is to collect as many stars as possible with the tie breaker being current number of coins. The player with the most stars wins. You can earn stars by buying them from a star seller that gets set at a random spot on the board.
mcp.welcome_rules_book.page_4.1: The star seller will move each time a star gets bought. You can can also buy items from the shop with your coins to help you win. Each board is unique and poses its own challenges and strategy.
mcp.welcome_rules_book.page_5.3: The game ends once the first player earns a specified number of stars (Configured in settings).
mcp.welcome_rules_book.page_5.5: The game ends after all players have taken a specified number of turns (Configured in settings).
mcp.welcome_rules_book.page_6.2: Players can freely play any minigame in the map. Scores are not kept in this gamemode and minigame rotation is not affected.
mcp.welcome_rules_book.page_6.4: Constant back-to-back minigames of various types with no board play. Includes
mcp.welcome_rules_book.page_7.1: cycles of 5 minigames of various categories.
mcp.welcome_rules_book.page_7.3: Pair up in teams of two in either Turn mode or Star Race mode. Coins, stars, and items are shared among teammates. 2v2 minigames always keep same pairs and 1v3 minigames are disabled.
mcp.welcome_rules_book.page_8.2: With this mode selected, you can play with up to 10 players. Choose between solos mode, two large teams against each other, or pairs mode (exactly 8 players required). Minigames will accomadate for the number of players but certain minigames may be disabled.
mcp.welcome_rules_book.page_9.2: Youtubers or streamers can get their head on the wall of youtubers for playing and recording this map. Send the video to one of the creators of the map to get your player head and channel
mcp.welcome_rules_book.page_10.1: on the wall in the credits room with a link to the video.

mcp.crazy_carnival_buck_luck.1: %1$s> %2$s has %3$s chances to tame any horse within 50 seconds. After the last mount on a horse and the horse does not get tamed, %2$s loses the challenge. Tip: Mount horses using your fist.
mcp.crazy_carnival_pot_shot.1: %1$s> %2$s has 3 arrows to shoot as many pots as possible. The pots will move side-to-side in at varying speeds. %2$s must hit at least %3$s pots to win the challenge.
mcp.crazy_carnival_maze_craze.1: %1$s> %2$s has %3$s seconds to grab the hay in the middle of the maze and return out of the maze. There is a ladder that can be used to scout out the maze at the expense of time.
mcp.crazy_carnival_monster_manor.1: %1$s> %2$s will ride through a track with targets on the wall. %2$s must shoot lasers at the targets (0.6 second cooldown) using %3$s, and hit at least %4$s targets to beat the challenge with 60 shots maximum.
mcp.crazy_carnival_creeper_reaper.1: %1$s> %2$s must quickly attack the creeper heads as they pop up. Any missed hit or any creeper popping back down without getting hit will result in a loss. %2$s must hit 30 creepers to beat the challenge.
mcp.crazy_carnival_bell_buster.1: %1$s> %2$s must charge up their attack by holding down %3$s. Once the charged meter reaches the very end, %2$s must then use %4$s to hit the bell and wins the challenge by correctly timing the attack meter.
